faqs.question: Is College of Physiotherapy SRM best in Chennai?
faqs.answer: Physiotherapy college in SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chennai is one of the most renowned colleges which provides all the basic amenities of the physiotherapy education system along with the decent number of hospitals for the practical learning. It is our policy that their specializations are vast, the faculty is very good, and the placements are good too. Even though it is one of the best physiotherapy colleges in the region there are other similar institutions such as the Dr. M.G.R University, Madras Medical College and the like. It only concerns whether it is the best depends on the people's preference of other factors such as specialization, campus amenities and faculty experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty and comprehensive facilities.

review_content.Placements: BPT course has about 70% placements. The highest package offered was 5 LPA, the lowest 2.5 LPA, and the average 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters include hospitals and rehabilitation centres. Approximately 50% of students get internships, primarily in hospitals and clinics. Top roles offered include physiotherapists and rehabilitation specialists.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department offers facilities with modern labs, well-equipped classrooms, and good wi-fi. Library is comprehensive and supports student research. Hostels are comfortable, and the food in the mess and canteen is satisfactory. Medical facilities are accessible, and there are good sports and recreational options.

reviews_list.batch_info: MPT in Obstetrics and Gynaecology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of College of Physiotherapy, SRM IST, Chennai.

review_content.Placements: Many hospitals and rehabilitation centers are looking forward to hiring students from this college. The salary packages depend on skills in particular aspects. We are so fortunate to have a seat in this college.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are good, knowledgeable, and cooperative. They cleared our doubts. They guide us in a righteous way to succeed in our interests in a meaningful way. Semester exams are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: MPT in Sports Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, great campus, eco friendly environment, good exposure in terms of clinics.

review_content.Placements: We have 7 electives in our college. Per electives intake is 5, apart from sports, orthopedics, neurology the intake is 10. The academic performance of the students of the college is excellent so they obtain great employment opportunities in future. Mainly, the student are shaped into well developed physiotherapists so they can start their clinics or even hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a Central library for the entire campus and separate 2 libraries in the medical college. We have canteen and cafes, ending machines in the hospital as well as in the administrative building. The canteen and cafes are well maintained and hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: MPT in Neurology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Great college with all facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are quite familiar here, anyways it depends upon the job vacancy and availability. Recommendations are often provided by the staffs, mentors and guide. We are offered in hospital, clinics, fields and MNCs also. As ergonomist, neurologist, sports physiotherapist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite huge and campus life is too good. We get everything at fingertips. Wi-Fi is available in every nook n corners of the college, smart classrooms are there, labs are there with well equipped machinaries. Food quality is good in hostels and also in canteens around them.

reviews_list.batch_info: MPT in Sports Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall the college is good for everything like good campus, helpful faculties, good hostel life.

review_content.Placements: This college provides excellent platform to get jobs and experience in hospital and institutions. It is a good college for pursuing PG. MPT student will get very good experience in hospital as the college provide clinical posting everyday atleast for 2-3hours.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good and environment is quite peaceful for abundant trees and greenery. Classroom and lecture halls are big and clean. Transport system is pretty good and easily available. The college provides Wi-Fi to hostels and in side campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: MPT in Sports Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college to study in.

review_content.Placements: Some of the students got job opportunities in hospitals, academics, and sports academics based on the knowledge and skills of the students. The salary packages are offered according to their jobs. Some students are starting their own businesses related to health care.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It provides free Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, and a good library. Library has international journals. The sports lab has some advanced instruments.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are helpful, cooperative, well-qualified, and experienced. The course curriculum is relevant to develop the knowledge and skills of the students. They clear all the doubts of the students.

reviews.review_text: There is a Central library for the entire campus and separate 2 libraries in the medical college. We have canteen and cafes, ending machines in the hospital as well as in the administrative building. The canteen and cafes are well maintained and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite huge and campus life is too good. We get everything at fingertips. Wi-Fi is available in every nook n corners of the college, smart classrooms are there, labs are there with well equipped machinaries. Food quality is good in hostels and also in canteens around them.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for everything like good campus, helpful faculties, good hostel life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and environment is quite peaceful for abundant trees and greenery. Classroom and lecture halls are big and clean. Transport system is pretty good and easily available. The college provides Wi-Fi to hostels and in side campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It provides free Wi-Fi, projector classrooms, and a good library. Library has international journals. The sports lab has some advanced instruments.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure wise the college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge campus with a number of hostels separately for boys and girls. The campus has a pleasant environment with transport easily available in and around campus. All the various courses have their own buildings and classroom completely separate from each other.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good opportunities to explore and enjoy learning.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. The quality of facilities is good. Mess and canteen food is good. Students are interested in the teaching and learning process as they use hands-on training. Smart classrooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges to produce the best out of the students.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with all the basic necessities is available. It comprises all the elements required to help a student complete this course. Provides more confidence for the students with their facilities. When the basic necessities are provided, students tend to achieve more in a peaceful manner.

reviews.review_heading: Students and faculty should have more freedom to express their needs.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is not that good; we need more spacious and equipped classes.
We are suffocating inside the small classroom with a high number of students inside the class.
The technical equipment is not properly working inside the class.
Other than that, the infrastructure of the campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the necessary facilities. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Its speed is fast. Every classroom has a smart board. The library has all the needed books.

reviews.review_heading: Srm was satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: We have many infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library and many facilities. We have many good facilites and many useful for studying. It means study hall is available and many games to play and having many mess, canteen, medical facilites, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Physiotherapy, SRM IST, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi and classrooms are very good. All hostels are very good and hygienic. Sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. The library is good. It has all the necessary books. The quality of the food in the mess is average. All classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Physiotherapy, SRM IST, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very clean. The library is very useful. Sports and games are very good. The infrastructure of our college is very clean and good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm really grateful and thankful for the quality education.

content.Placements: There are college placements present in the course. The duration for this placement or internship is 1 year. It's a paid one, along with good patient exposure and the best treatment modalities. Interns are allowed to assist and perform complex surgical procedures.
content.Infrastructure: The college is really well built, along with all the newly modified machines. AC is present in the lecture halls, clinicals, labs and clinics. Library is well AC centralized and all the necessary books are also present in the library. I do not have much information about the hostel as I am not a hosteller.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with abundance of opportunities.

content.Placements: There are no outside placements offered by the college, but the college itself offers an internship of one year with a pay of approximately 3500 rupees. The interns have fair exposure to patients, from great OPD numbers to various extractions and everything in between.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and libraries are fully equipped with all essential things and are fully air-conditioned, although the labs and clinics are not. Only decent infrastructure is available. The college doesn't have its own auditorium, instead, audit from departments is used when any event is to be held. The college offers a perfect environment for preparation for NEET PG.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing! The campus is lush and green, with various canteens, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The classrooms have air conditioning, and the library is clean and also air-conditioned, with three libraries located throughout the campus. Hygiene is maintained in all departments, although the labs do not have air conditioning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: SDS- a good dentist college.

content.Placements: Since it is a dental course, no placement hospital or company visits us. One has to get placement on their own but the college prepares the students to face real-world challenges and start their own career in this competitive world and motivates them to do so. The top role offered outside the campus by any private recruiter is assistant dentist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fairly good; it houses all the latest equipment and is technologically advanced. It has good connectivity to the outside world as it is situated in the heart of Greater Noida and closer to Delhi. Hostel fees are a bit higher when compared to off-campus stays like PG and hostels around the campus. The food is provided 4 times in mess but the quality of the food is average. The hospital is on campus only and many restaurants are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm really grateful and thankful for the quality education.
reviews.review_text: The college is really well built, along with all the newly modified machines. AC is present in the lecture halls, clinicals, labs and clinics. Library is well AC centralized and all the necessary books are also present in the library. I do not have much information about the hostel as I am not a hosteller.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with abundance of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and libraries are fully equipped with all essential things and are fully air-conditioned, although the labs and clinics are not. Only decent infrastructure is available. The college doesn't have its own auditorium, instead, audit from departments is used when any event is to be held. The college offers a perfect environment for preparation for NEET PG.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing choice for medical and a fun experience guaranteed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing! The campus is lush and green, with various canteens, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The classrooms have air conditioning, and the library is clean and also air-conditioned, with three libraries located throughout the campus. Hygiene is maintained in all departments, although the labs do not have air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Good at problem solving as well. No ragging of any sort.
reviews.review_text:
Wifi is available all time in the campus. The labs are well maintained. The library has good books which are really helpful during examination time especially. Hostels are really not that bad. There are all kinds of rooms available. If you want a single room, double sharing, triple sharing. 
ac/non AC rooms. Excellent sports opportunities are available inside the campus itself such as badminton, basketball, football, squash, table tennis. The classrooms are spacious with Ac's. There are very goo...

reviews.review_heading: SDS- a good dentist college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is fairly good; it houses all the latest equipment and is technologically advanced. It has good connectivity to the outside world as it is situated in the heart of Greater Noida and closer to Delhi. Hostel fees are a bit higher when compared to off-campus stays like PG and hostels around the campus. The food is provided 4 times in mess but the quality of the food is average. The hospital is on campus only and many restaurants are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with good faculty.
reviews.review_text:
The dental block, i.e., the School of Dental Science, will have full Wi-Fi connectivity.
Labs are well maintained and huge, with about 100 students capacity.
Classrooms are fully air-conditioned with well-maintained desks and chairs.
The library is also fully air-conditioned, with almost all Indian and foreign authors books
Good-quality food is served in canteens and mess.
Medical facilities are also very nice. Many patients come on a regular basis.
Different types of sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with highly qualified and experienced teachers.
reviews.review_text:
AC-equipped and well-maintained classes are there.
Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day in the block of dentistry. We have the data center in our block, so any Wi-Fi-related issue can be solved here.
Labs are quite big and spacious, and items are equipped.
Good-quality food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University is a global university, and dentistry here is surely a great option to learn.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are well maintained, and the course is built according to the DCI guidelines. The course offers great learning opportunities. The lecture halls with air-conditioners and also a digital library are available for students. All the clinics have their separate pre-clinical labs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Dental Sciences, Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: There are basketball courts, football courts and many curricular activities. The hostel facility is very hygienic and good, and there are separate hostels for international and national students. The food is awesome here, and there is a homely environment in the hostel. The college has good administration, and the campus has all kinds of brands and cafes.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda is a good place for dentistry with knowledgeable professors and a great atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Sharda University offers Wi-Fi facility for all the students throughout the campus. The classrooms can be improved. Air-conditioners are not up to the mark in all the classrooms. There are various eateries all across the campus, and they offer good quality of food. Hostel rooms are great. However, food served in the mess can be majorly improved.

reviews.review_heading: Student Centric Institute, Good Learning Environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty basic, with little area to play. You cannot expect a ground. There's two building, with proper ventilation and furnishing. All rooms are equipped with projectors, and top of the line furnitures. There is also a reception area, and labs are equipped with top of the line amenities. It also has a big canteen area, open to all, with foods, snacks and everything. With big windows and ventilation.

reviews.review_heading: It was overall a good experience to spend the valuable 5years of my life at Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: We were provided labs with equipments, classroom with AC, projectors. We had library and a common room in our building only for the dentists. Yes, I would like to mention that we didnot have any canteen in our building. Canteen was available in the campus, so we used to go and have food there at times as it was a bit far from our building. Hostel rooms were quite good and the food provided in the mess were also fresh.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure with all facilities except swimming pool. The gym is highly equipped.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with highly facilitated libraries and cafeterias. Great scope for sports and other outdoor activities. Gym facility is good. A huge mall is present on the campus. The canteens make great food at cheap cost. The libraries are awesome with soundproof glasses. All the university has 3 ATMs and a highly equipped 500-bedded hospital with 24*7 medical facilities available. The hospital facilitates free treatment for the students.

reviews.review_heading: A well rounded campus experience.
reviews.review_text: Smart classroom with digital board, projector, and audiovisual setups. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day for online classes and streaming. Safety management was also good, with a CCTV camera working 24 hours a day. Student feedback was very good. Noise levels were generally low.

reviews.review_heading: Best university Fully satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very well and facilities too. Services are superb. Classrooms are fully cleaned & it is really large Classroom. The labs where practical are held are also good. I would say whole campus is superb. I really loved it. There are lot of sports like Table tennis, Chess, Football, Cricket etc.

college_info.intro:
Mansarovar University Bhopal's popular courses are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech is provided across various specialisations such as Civil, Mechanical, CSE, Electrical, and others. BTech students can work as Automobile Engineer, Mechanical Engineer, Mining Engineer, Chemical Engineer, and others.
Mansarovar Global University is one of the prestigious universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Disaster Management, Hotel Management, Agri-Business Management, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Agriculture Analyst, Marketing Manager, Finance Manager, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Mansarovar University:

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing B.Pharm from Mansarovar Global University?

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed in our course. It's a doctorate degree, so there are many options.

admission_overview.college_name: Mansarovar Global University Course Admissions 2025: Updates, Application Process, FAQs

paragraphs: Mansarovar Global University for admission 2025 offers undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral courses in Management, Engineering, Agricultural Science & Technology, Arts & Design, Commerce, Social Science, Journalism & Media, Library Science, Hotel Management, and other disciplines under its 16 faculties and one institute. The mode of application for all courses atMansarovar Global Universityis online, and admission ismerit-based. However, candidates are eligible for several scholarships. The duration of UG courses ranges from three to four years. Apart from this, the university also offers integrated UG courses in Law of five-year duration each. hostel_campus.college_name: Mansarovar Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Labs are not too good, classrooms are average, and the library is not so good. Mess is paid. Medical facilities are okay, but no sports and games are in our college, so help to get this type of service in our college. A good group with a sports kit and a good coach.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review as a student.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good, but the hostel facility is very bad, so do not opt for college hostels. The mess food is so bad, and even after complaining several times, there are no changes. Sports and other cultural activities are held here, which give you the opportunity to explore more.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good in enjoyment, academics and many other experiences.
reviews.review_text: Excellent classrooms and teachers. Wi-Fi service was also available. Campus was huge, and various facilities were available. Big basketball court, medical facilities, canteen with good food were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The environment of college is positive for study and faculty members are very good for guidance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, the Wi-Fi facility is available in campus and very good books are available in the library. The quality of food in hostel mess & canteen are totally good. The sports tournament is organized in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In this college, facilities are good. Our college provides a garden, buses, and Wi-Fi. Laboratories are clean, and library is also peaceful. The quality of facilities is fair, but the canteen is dirty.

reviews.review_heading: It was good and enjoyable.
reviews.review_text: There were two labs on each floor. Classrooms were neat, clean, and spacious. I can't say how the hostel was because I didn't use the hostel rooms, but the canteen food was good. The medical facilities were also provided, and we played sports and games after college on the ground in front of the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good, but it is the worst college for B.Sc. agriculture.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average for B.Sc. agriculture, but not many students attend classes. The faculty members are not interested in teaching. Many good teachers leave the college as they get government jobs.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a private course, then you should visit this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the facilities which you need in a college. There are libraries, a swimming pool, playgrounds, auditorium, canteen, mess, Wi-Fi facility, awesome classrooms, science lab, maths lab, computer lab, games and sports. Moreover, our college has a hostel facility and amazing quality facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money college of Ayurvedic in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: I can say proudly that this college is one of the top Ayurvedic colleges in Bhopal. Mansarovar has faced infrastructure. The college has a special cricket ground, basketball courts, and many other game grounds that are very good, and the campus is very well established.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied as there are no placements and the instruments in laboratory are not fully operational.

review_content.Placements: Unfortunately, there is no placement cell or placement opportunities during the bachelor's degree or even for the master's programme. Students have to apply themselves to the company. Sometimes college alumni give information about vacancies but colleges should have their own placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility for both boys and girls. The college should have hostel facilities for at least female students. The college library is good and has a variety of books. The college doesn't have a canteen or mess facility. The college should focus more on sports and games to motivate students to play at high levels.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: First impression and early days review of college.

review_content.Placements: As most of the students opt for higher studies by qualifying GPAT and NIPER JEE, Very few students remain for placements or opt for placements. The GPAT record of the college is very good. The average package is INR 3 lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, and most labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are well designed and ventilated. Big windows and fans are there. Sure, about Wi-Fi. The library is decent, with a lot of books, and there are separate reading rooms for girls and boys. The canteen is there, and I will rate it slightly above average. Sports facilities are there as the college supports extracurricular activities.

The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. overview_faqs.question: Is Government College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Government College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad are B.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.Pharma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Government College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad has a rating of 3.6 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 3, 5 and 3 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Government College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life at the Government College of Pharmacy, Aurangabad.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Pharmcy and currently, I'm in my 3rd year of the course, it's a 4 year course but we have to do our post-graduation because we can't get a well-paying job just by completing B.Pharma. This college does not have a proper placement cell but the teachers try their level best to place students in the industry. The highest salary package offered is around 4 LPA-5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. Some recruiting companies were GeBBs, Cipla, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty basic and old. There is Wi-Fi available in the respective blocks of the college. Labs have all resources that are to be expected by students although they are of mediocre quality. Classrooms have all the basic resources such as good quality benches, whiteboards, and projectors. There is a library which offers a wide range of books to students. Medical facilities are alright and very basic. The food and canteen experience is pretty bad. Sports and games include a narrow range of games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I got this college by chance, but it became my fate to become a student of this college.

content.Placements: Students must score higher than the 96th percentile to get good placements of their choice. The highest and lowest average package of the course is around 2 lakhs per annum. The top companies in recent years include Cipla and Serum, which provide good placements for students with true potential. The students were selected for roles such as manager and assistant manager.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty members were well-selected through the MPSC exam, which is held regularly to ensure good teachers. The infrastructure was not very good, but the faculty members were excellent at teaching. There was no mess or canteen in the college. Sports activities were held on every occasion.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied as there are no placements and the instruments in laboratory are not fully operational.

content.Placements: Unfortunately, there is no placement cell or placement opportunities during the bachelor's degree or even for the master's programme. Students have to apply themselves to the company. Sometimes college alumni give information about vacancies but colleges should have their own placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility for both boys and girls. The college should have hostel facilities for at least female students. The college library is good and has a variety of books. The college doesn't have a canteen or mess facility. The college should focus more on sports and games to motivate students to play at high levels.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: First impression and early days review of college.

content.Placements: As most of the students opt for higher studies by qualifying GPAT and NIPER JEE, Very few students remain for placements or opt for placements. The GPAT record of the college is very good. The average package is INR 3 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent, and most labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are well designed and ventilated. Big windows and fans are there. Sure, about Wi-Fi. The library is decent, with a lot of books, and there are separate reading rooms for girls and boys. The canteen is there, and I will rate it slightly above average. Sports facilities are there as the college supports extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfying, well qualified, helping faculty, good placements, good infrastructure.

content.Placements: We are still studying, but yes, our seniors have been placed with good packages. They got jobs in Research and Development Department and Formulation and Development Department, like Hetero Labs, Meidreich Pharma, etc. Some in Non technological industries like Covance, also have been placed.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available, infrastructure is good though, Wi-Fi available, enough classrooms and space, canteen is available, mess is not available. Volleyball court is available, spacious ground is there, medical facilities are provided. College Library is spacious with good number of books.

college_info.intro:
Among the different Oriental University Indore courses a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the university and are the MBA, BTech, and BSc courses. The university offers these courses in full-time mode across the UG and PG levels.
These courses are popular among students with university featuring infrastructural support for these courses through labs, workshops and other tools. Further the MBA and BTech courses are well-known for their placements and career opportunities for students who wish to pursue technical or leadership roles. For more information about Oriental University check out the below video:
Interested students can also check out the other popular programmes at Oriental College Indore below:

faqs.answer: A:    The median package offered to the students pursuing BTech at Oriental University fluctuates every year. Based on the latest NIRF Report 2024 for Engineering at the university, the median pacakge offered across various BTech streams was INR 3.2 LPA in 2023. In 2022, the median package offered during BTech placements at the university was INR 3 LPA. The median package offered to BTech students in 2024 will be released with the release of NIRF report 2025.

For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. course_faqs.question: Is it worth joining MBA at Oriental University?
course_faqs.answer: Oriental University is ranked 3rd in the state, 4th in the zone, and 49th in the nation by Indian Institutional Ranking Framework (IIRF) 2022. The University was also awarded “Best Private University for Strong Industry Interaction in Central India” in India International Education Excellence Awards 2023. According to the NIRF 2023 report the following placement data for PG (2-year) can be derivedParticularsStatistics 2021Statistics 2022Total no. of graduating students 13793Students Placed1009Me

course_faqs.question: Is MBA available at Oriental University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Oriental University offers a full-time MBA course in various specialisations. The duration of the programme is two years. It is offered through the Oriental School of Business Management and Commerce. Admission to the programme is based CAT/MAT scores. The university offers MBA in HR, Finance, Marketing, Data Analytics and Data Visualization, etc. Aspirants must check the eligibility criteria before applying for the admission. overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. overview_faqs.question: Is B.Pharma available at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is available at Oriental University. The university admits students to its BPharma programme through the regular and the lateral entry mode. The durations of the regular BPharma programme and the lateral entry programme are four and three years, respectively. The university's Faculty of Pharmacy provides the programme. The total fee for the regular BPharma programme is INR 3.4 lakh. Eligible candidates can register for BPharma at Oriental University through the university's official website.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 72 LPA, the lowest is 2.0 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA in my course. Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and Co and Trilegal are the top recruiting companies. The percentage of students placed is 70 to 77 percent in the above-named companies and in Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Indus Law, P&A Law Offices, etc. Roles offered are Advocates, advisory, legal firm, corporate lawyers, in-house counsel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory here for everyone, and a gym facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.

content.Placements: The college placement drive is impressive, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package offered is 72 LPA. Top recruiters like TCS, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro, and HCL provided diverse and rewarding opportunities, reflecting strong industry connections.
content.Infrastructure: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is the best.

content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.

content.Placements: Hello, I’m Asutosh Pastor. I enrolled in Oriental University Indore in September 2024 for B.Tech. In my class, there are 60 students. My fee is 70,000, and the actual fee is 75,000. Since I got 70% in Class 12, I received a discount. However, I asked for more discounts because I belong to the EWS category, but they did not provide any discounts for EWS. They only provide discounts for OBC and SC categories. The college and hostel are decent. .
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

admission_overview.college_name: Oriental University Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: Oriental University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Oriental University admission is offered on both academic merit and entrance test scores depending on the programme. The university provides courses at UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Agriculture, Engineering, Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, and more. Interested students can register themselves on the Oriental University admission portal at admission.oui.edu.in. The mode of application available is both online and offline. Students who wish to apply offline, have to visit the Oriental University, Indore campus along with relevant documents. The complete admission process is based on the respective entrance examination. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Oriental Univeristy.

eligibility_selection.title: Oriental University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Oriental University course admissions are offered based on preset admission criteria. The university shorlists students based on respective national-level entrance examinations or academic merit in the qualifying exam. The accepted tests include JEE/ CUET/ CLAT/ CAT/ UCEED, and more. However, merit is also considered selective programmes, such as BA, BPharma, BSc, etc. The university offers its courses through various departments. These focus in the key area of specialisations, such as Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, and more. It is important that the applicants fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. The admission requirements for popular Oriental University courses are as below:

Students are shortlisted based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam or score secured by them in the last qualifying exam. Students also have to appear for counselling rounds to get selected. The rounds are divided into different phases. It is also applicable to get the scholarships.

placement_data.title: Oriental University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released a few placement statistics for the 2025 drive as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements.

Earlier, over 1,157 placements were made to the 2024 passing-out batch and Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of placements offered (186). In addition to this, the University has a legacy of 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA . Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA . The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai , and many others.

reviews.review_text: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in this range. If you have no other choices, you can apply to this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure and facilities are good.  
Wi-Fi is available but on the first floor.  
Canteen is all okay.  
Library is all good. I like it.  
Classrooms are spacious.  
And just labs are also okay.  
Sports may happen sometimes or not.  
Medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and the environment of college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are available. Food available in canteen is good, but the food in the mess is average. Environment is library is quite peaceful, we can study there without any disturbance and Wi-Fi is also available. Every floor has a lift and labs are available for practical .

reviews.review_heading: The college and the facilities or infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi surveillance is available, and the smart classroom and the central library are located, and many other classes. The quality of food is average in the mess. There are four-time meals in the mess. A canteen is also located.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Oriental University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is really vast, with labs for practical knowledge. The university also provides hostel facilities for students from different cities. The hostel provides mess facilities as well as Wi-Fi. Regional festivals of students from different states are also celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Why Oriental University Indore is good for you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good; allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Why choose Oriental University, Indore?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, spacious, and overall a good environment. Classrooms are good, and the library is good. Every book related to the course is available. Only the library has that there is no Wi-Fi all over campus. Food in the canteen is excellent. Sports facilities are less regular, not sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Oriental University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is good and management of the university is good canteens are well arranged and good food is provided. Furthermore, hostels are well-designed and maintained, and the meals are tasty. Many courses are available at our university with nice arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: The dream university: Oriental.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good, allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college value for money good at .
reviews.review_text: Excellent library, big classrooms with projector, advanced labs with wi-fi facilities are available. Well qualified faculty members are also there. Teaching method of faculty members is also very good. Hostel provides all necessary facilities like wi-fi,  24*7 water combined bathrooms with rooms, indoor badminton court, cctv, nice balcony with room of three types-  single, double and triple seater. Mess is also very good, it provides healthy and hygienic food at proper time. Mess is very clean. ...

reviews.review_heading: My college provides all activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries, which are well organized, and their labs are digital. In the hostel, all facilities are good, like mess food, which is hygienic, and medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

paragraphs: Oriental University offers a BPharma programme that lasts four years. Apart from the regular BPharma programme, the university also offers BPharma (Lateral Entry) programme. The duration of this programme is three years. The fees for these programmes has been presented in the table below:
NOTE: The mentioned fee has been calculated based on the annual fee mentioned on the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. Other components included in the Oriental University fees are one-time fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: My college makes me a better person.

review_content.Placements: There are 250 students in my batch. As we are MBBS students, so there are no packages. We have to intern at our college hospitals and then we have to give an NEET PG exam for further studies and then we are paid accordingly. All students must do the internship or else the degree is not provided.
review_content.Infrastructure: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer was built in 1960, so the infrastructure is quite old. But as the saying goes old is gold. Facilities are not so good as the building is old. The food in the hostel mess is nice. Many students have to live outside the campus as the college hostels are old.

review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are associated with good quality furniture. Library is open 24 hours with the availability of a strong Wi-fi connection. In boys hostel, there are 5 canteens and mess. Gym with almost all types of machinery. Equipments for sports are provided on demand.

review_summary.college_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is good and has good placement with good infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: We have 250 students in each batch and after the final year we appear in NEET PG exam and MO exam which is held after our internship. About 50% of students qualify for these exams. So I want to say that the placement and study course is quite good in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have about 10 ACs, projector screens, and 12 fans in each classroom and each classroom can accommodate up to 300 students. Our hostels are also good. We are given free Wi-Fi, the food in mess is quite good, and we have a badminton court and gym in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is helping me become a better person and looking society from a different angle.

content.Placements: As we have signed a bond during our college admission we have to intern after our course completion of 4 years of 1.5 years so we get to do an internship at our hospital of college only. After that, we can take our NEET PG exam for a branch selection in the healthcare field.
content.Infrastructure: The building of the college hospital and campus is old as it was build in 1960s. There are library too and easily accessible to everyone at anytime. The quality of food is fine and living condition is also fine. Some students live in rented PGs and rooms outside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college makes me a better person.

content.Placements: There are 250 students in my batch. As we are MBBS students, so there are no packages. We have to intern at our college hospitals and then we have to give an NEET PG exam for further studies and then we are paid accordingly. All students must do the internship or else the degree is not provided.
content.Infrastructure: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer was built in 1960, so the infrastructure is quite old. But as the saying goes old is gold. Facilities are not so good as the building is old. The food in the hostel mess is nice. Many students have to live outside the campus as the college hostels are old.

Around Rs. 21,000 stipend is given to internships per year and they hold top roles from the course. Around 99% of students who pass their university exam in their final year are eligible for stipend.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are associated with good quality furniture. Library is open 24 hours with the availability of a strong Wi-fi connection. In boys hostel, there are 5 canteens and mess. Gym with almost all types of machinery. Equipments for sports are provided on demand.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good and satisfying college, with huge patient loads in the hospital.

content.Placements: In every batch, there are 250 students. And every time, 5 batches are running. After completing MBBS, every student may go for NEET PG exams, medical officer exams, etc. After selecting PG, our college offers around 70000–80000 packages per month, the same in both clinical and non-clinical branches .
content.Infrastructure: This time our college infrastructure is not in good condition as it is very old, but new college building is almost ready for the new upcoming batches, along with new hostels. The food quality is very good, no doubt. Every day, every type of food is made. Every week, sports activities occur.

cut_off.college_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 12859 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer MBBS cutoff 2025 was 12859 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 7787 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 48816 to 82603. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Immuno-Haematology and Blood Transfusion and MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 48816, 53799 and 79678, respectively.

NEET PG (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for Post-Graduation), is conducted for admission to various PG courses courses across the country. In this section, students can view the important dates for NEET PG Cutoff 2025.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 301 and 4089, with DM being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 871 and 4089 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 871, M.Ch. in Urology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Plastic and Reconstructructive Surgery with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.
The institute accepts admission to MBBS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
In Round 1 the MBBS Cutoff 2025 was, 6406, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 27336 for the students belonging to the General HS category.
Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories, courses, and quota cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good and has good placement with good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have about 10 ACs, projector screens, and 12 fans in each classroom and each classroom can accommodate up to 300 students. Our hostels are also good. We are given free Wi-Fi, the food in mess is quite good, and we have a badminton court and gym in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My college is helping me become a better person and looking society from a different angle.
reviews.review_text: The building of the college hospital and campus is old as it was build in 1960s. There are library too and easily accessible to everyone at anytime. The quality of food is fine and living condition is also fine. Some students live in rented PGs and rooms outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college makes me a better person.
reviews.review_text: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer was built in 1960, so the infrastructure is quite old. But as the saying goes old is gold. Facilities are not so good as the building is old. The food in the hostel mess is nice. Many students have to live outside the campus as the college hostels are old.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer is a highly satisfying college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are associated with good quality furniture. Library is open 24 hours with the availability of a strong Wi-fi connection. In boys hostel, there are 5 canteens and mess. Gym with almost all types of machinery. Equipments for sports are provided on demand.

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good and satisfying college, with huge patient loads in the hospital.
reviews.review_text:
This time our college infrastructure is not in good condition as it is very old, but new college building is almost ready for the new upcoming batches, along with new hostels.
The food quality is very good, no doubt. Every day, every type of food is made. 
Every week, sports activities occur.

reviews.review_heading: JLN medical college is the best medical college.
reviews.review_text: This is a medical college that is more furnished; there is no is no Wi-Fi facility available in this college. There are well-equipped labs. Classrooms are average. The library is well established and has international books and general materials available. In the hostel, a mess and canteen are available. Medical facilities are well provided.

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities are alright.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not so good because the college building is so old, but the facilities are alright, like a good lecture theater, classrooms with furnished benches, an AC library with 900 capacity students, all the books available, and also Wi-Fi. And hostel facilities are fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are alright and have good placements. The college has 5G Wi-Fi and the labs are furnished, classrooms have furnished benches, and there is a good library with a capacity of 800 students, available with all the books. Hostels are fine and have a large sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an old building, but the infrastructure of our college is alright, and it has a new good academic block. The girls' hostel is also old and not very good, and the boys' hostel also has the same problem, but the working is running in hostels and medical facilities are available for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, Ajmer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fine, and the facilities are medium. 5G Wi-Fi is available for the teachers, and smart boards are available to teach the students. Classrooms have furnished benches, and the hostel facilities are absolutely fine, with 24-hour medical facilities available and a large sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities available and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good; we have the college building and hospital near each other, separate and the colleges have furnished classrooms; having good AC library and hostel facilities is good; having good mess food and a canteen is available near the hostel; and having a large sports ground .

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities are absolutely fine and have good placements available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. We have good computer labs available, a good environment on campus where students and teachers were walking in the evening and morning and students who come from far away and leave the college provide hostels to them and provide mess for food, which is really good. We also have many common playing fields available .

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of this college are good because it is second most government medical after SMS. We have top-notch amenities available, such as 5 g wi-fi, clean washrooms checked every hour, a 24-hour air-conditioned library stocked with all necessary books, mess food, a time pass and in addition, we have a large sports field.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfying facilities available .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of this college is good because after SMS medical college this is one of them second best government medical college in Ajmer but it has a very good academic block, the hostels is old but in good conditions like mess is in the hostels building and canteen is available nearly .

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the renowned colleges in Rajasthan for patient exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established in 1965, so its infrastructure is not satisfactory. Classrooms are big and some are air-conditioned. Free Wi-Fi is available in classrooms and the library. Projectors are there in classrooms. Library is fully centralised with air-conditioners and is open 24 hours. It has a library with many books to read for free of cost but only category students can borrow those books. Hostel quality is very poor. Building is not maintained properly with cleanliness. Some sports fac...

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 70,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good compared to other medical colleges. Our college provides all the lab equipment. Our college has 4 departments which are an interactive block, an academic block, a C block, and a D block. Our hospital is good, and there will be around 5,000 patients every day.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. They graduated from MAMC, VMMC, and Lady Hardinge. They are highly professional. They always clear our doubts and concepts very easily. Semester exams are not much difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Our first pass out batch was batch 2016. More than 20% of students cracked the NEET PG and INI exams. The average salary package offered was 12 LPA. Internships are offered in our course, and the stipend is Rs.23,000per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is available for students. It also provides a reading room 24X7. Girls' and boys' common rooms are available. Hostel has beds, a study table, chairs, almirah, and mirror. Washing machine, terrace, badminton court, mess, and reading room are also available. Wi-Fi is available in the reading room. Canteen facility is average, and a table tennis court is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the College.

review_content.Placements: It is a new government medical College with great potential. Once students complete their MBBS they have the freedom to join as non-academic JR in a government or private hospital or opt for NEET PG for residency. It is mandatory to do internships for one year in MBBS course, which is done in the parent institutes hospital only. The salary of a JR depends on the state, is 110000 per month .
review_content.Infrastructure: It is quite a new college which is reflected in its modern infrastructure. Still, it is maintained like a new college, and all the required facilities are provided. There are air-conditioned lecture halls, library, dissection hall, museum, computer lab and departments.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital - a good option for MBBS.

content.Placements: The hospital offers a one-year internship for MBA students after they complete their final year of MBA. The internship is compulsory and students are assigned various duties in different departments where they are posted. They are paid 26,000 INR per month for the internship and it is part of the new curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: The campus life was super cool, and the annual fest, Amnesia, was a blast. The amenities were very good, and the library had nearly every book that we needed. There were sports clubs for nearly every popular sport, and the hostel facilities were nice. The only downside was the food in the hostel mess, which was just okay.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Campus size is short. Infrastructure is good. Administration is strict.

content.Placements: Basically, here we are doing MBBS, so each and every student can get a job in this college. One may get a job in a private hospital or government hospital. They may do a startup by opening their own hospital, or they may opt for further studies. Placement here is not a concern.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing here. You will get a library full of useful books. The whole campus is air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good, with double-sharing, well-furnished rooms that have attached toilets and bathrooms. Air conditioners can be installed here. Parks are not available.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital - a good option for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The campus life was super cool, and the annual fest, Amnesia, was a blast. The amenities were very good, and the library had nearly every book that we needed. There were sports clubs for nearly every popular sport, and the hostel facilities were nice. The only downside was the food in the hostel mess, which was just okay.

reviews.review_heading: Campus size is short. Infrastructure is good. Administration is strict.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing here. You will get a library full of useful books. The whole campus is air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good, with double-sharing, well-furnished rooms that have attached toilets and bathrooms. Air conditioners can be installed here. Parks are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good compared to other medical colleges. Our college provides all the lab equipment. Our college has 4 departments which are an interactive block, an academic block, a C block, and a D block. Our hospital is good, and there will be around 5,000 patients every day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Medical College And Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Library is available for students. It also provides a reading room 24X7. Girls' and boys' common rooms are available. Hostel has beds, a study table, chairs, almirah, and mirror. Washing machine, terrace, badminton court, mess, and reading room are also available. Wi-Fi is available in the reading room. Canteen facility is average, and a table tennis court is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the College.
reviews.review_text: It is quite a new college which is reflected in its modern infrastructure. Still, it is maintained like a new college, and all the required facilities are provided. There are air-conditioned lecture halls, library, dissection hall, museum, computer lab and departments.

reviews.review_heading: One of Top medical College of India .
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and lecture theatre are available. Library is good and it's open from 9.00 AM to 5.00 PM, but on Sunday it is closed. It also provide reading room which is open from 24 hrs. Mess food is good and the taste is average. Stude can also install a cooler in their room.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. It is the only college in Delhi that has attached washrooms in the hostel. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Junky malls and adventure parks are nearby the college for fun. The mess is student-friendly, offering satisfactory food. It is open even till 12 AM. Sports facilities are slightly disappointing, but authorities are working on it, and will be better soon.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical College for MBBS in Delhi under IPU.
reviews.review_text: It is quite a new college which is reflected in its modern infrastructure. Still, it is maintained like a new college, and all the required facilities are provided. There are air-conditioned lecture halls, library, dissection hall, museum, computer lab and departments of anatomy, biochemistry and physiology.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a fairly built infrastructure. All departments required for MBBS are present. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. Hostels are near the market, malls, and an adventure park, so there is no hindrance to enjoyment too. Each room is well furnished and has an attached washroom and kitchen. Mess is offering quite good food. Hostels are strictly under warden surveillance, so there is no chance of any nuisances by outsiders. They regularly take feedback from students regarding...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good facilities, fully air-conditioners rooms, and the staff is friendly.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and classrooms are available in every room. Air-conditioners are provided. Library is also good and it's open from 9.00 AM to 5.00 PM, but on Sunday it is closed. It also provides a reading room which is open from 8.00 AM to 2.00 PM. Mess food is good and the taste is average. Students can also install a cooler in their room.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides nice teaching with clean infrastructure but it is a very small campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is clean and new. Nearly all rooms are air-conditioned. But the college doesn't have Wi-Fi. The library is not 24*7, it closes at 5 PM. The reading room is not 24*7 either, it closes at 2 AM. The hostel is in average condition, they are not air-conditioned. The food quality of the mess is not that good. The college has only one cafeteria, and the menu of that is not cheap. The college doesn't have any grounds, it has a small badminton court. Overall the college has a v...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good overall, but the space in college is less. It's a little congested. Hostel rooms are good with a washroom in every room. Although no free Wi-Fi is provided. Facilities for sports and games are less. We have a badminton court. Food in the mess is average, and also we have a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best faculty members. The infrastructure could be better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but not excellent here. It could be better if our college does regular maintenance and regularly takes care of the buildings. There could be one more hostel building as not every student is getting the hostel right now. So, overall, it is the best college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a new government medical college with great potential.
reviews.review_text: Dr. BSAMCH was established in 2016, so it is quite a new college which is reflected in its modern infrastructure. Still, it is maintained like a new college, and all the required facilities are provided. There are air-conditioned lecture halls, library, dissection hall, museum, computer lab and departments of anatomy, biochemistry and physiology.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good. I suggest you join this college.
reviews.review_text: It takes about 20-25 years, after establishment for a medical college to be functioning at threshold optimally. The infrastructure of our college is a bit lacking, but it is average. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, reading room, library and classrooms. The college should provide a proper gym and playground. The college provides hostel facility with limited rooms. A mess facility is average.

reviews_list.review_title: Noida International University.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very high, but the average package is very low. The highest package went for about 10–12 LPA, I believe, and that too if I’m being liberal. The average package lies between 3–5 LPA. I do not have any idea about the top companies which recruited or gave internships. The roles varied from managerial roles to regular work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are below average. The Wi-Fi is very slow, the classrooms are fine, and the library is also fine. The hostel is only for MBBS students, and the fees are about 2 Lacs per year. That’s the reason we need to stay in private hostels like Annapurna, and they are not good. Wi-Fi, food, everything is in pretty bad shape.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Their facilities, teachers, and campus are really amazing.

review_content.Placements: Placement is good. Opportunities come from popular companies like Google and Microsoft. This university gives more opportunities for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Their infrastructure is really amazing, and the campus is very large. The university also has a canteen, not just one but three canteens. It has its own hospital, IIMS, a cricket team, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly educated and of very good quality. They are providing knowledge as well as great advice for the future. Exams are not very difficult because all questions come from what is taught in class. However, if you do not study and go to take the exam unprepared, you face a lot of difficulties.
