individual_reviews.course: MBA (Dual Specialization) in Marketing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for placement and other facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students were placed with different organizations during campus placements. The highest package is 13.96 LPA from Zaro Education, and the average is approximately 4 LPA. The top is Zaro Education. Almost 80% of students got internships from the campus itself. The top role offered from an MBA is in sales.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the course are fantastic. It is a good place to visit and spend time, providing internet for every individual with a unique ID and password. Labs are all well-equipped and have high-end computers, with smart TVs in class and fully air-conditioned inside the building. The hostel is not on the campus. It usually gives students different hostels that are not under the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering-AI&ML in collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you have no choice left or don't plan to rely on college, then you can think about this college.

content.Placements: Since I'm still in my second year, no one from my batch has got an internship or placement till now through college, as far as I know, but yes, some are doing internships, including me, but they have got them off-campus. As for seniors, I don't hear much about their placement, although it's true that companies like IBM, TCs, and Samsung are coming to the college, but I think many just get removed in the first round. As far as I have heard from my teachers and other students.
content.Infrastructure: First of all, this college only provides hostels for some medical students. It does not have a hostel for any other schools. As for the infrastructure, I would say it is decent for what you would expect from a tier 3 college. There are six computer labs in the main Newton block. Except for 1 or 2, all the computer labs are decent enough, but I would not say the same for other labs. The library is decent too.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in International Relations - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Noida International University.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very high, but the average package is very low. The highest package went for about 10–12 LPA, I believe, and that too if I’m being liberal. The average package lies between 3–5 LPA. I do not have any idea about the top companies which recruited or gave internships. The roles varied from managerial roles to regular work.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are below average. The Wi-Fi is very slow, the classrooms are fine, and the library is also fine. The hostel is only for MBBS students, and the fees are about 2 Lacs per year. That’s the reason we need to stay in private hostels like Annapurna, and they are not good. Wi-Fi, food, everything is in pretty bad shape.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Their facilities, teachers, and campus are really amazing.

content.Placements: Placement is good. Opportunities come from popular companies like Google and Microsoft. This university gives more opportunities for students.
content.Infrastructure: Their infrastructure is really amazing, and the campus is very large. The university also has a canteen, not just one but three canteens. It has its own hospital, IIMS, a cricket team, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly educated and of very good quality. They are providing knowledge as well as great advice for the future. Exams are not very difficult because all questions come from what is taught in class. However, if you do not study and go to take the exam unprepared, you face a lot of difficulties.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is moderate. The study here is average, like all Greater Noida colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 20 percent of students got placements, I think, which is very low compared to other colleges. The highest package is around 12 LPA, I think, and the average package is 4 LPA, which is very low compared to the fees they are charging us for 4 years. Infosys-type companies hire students from our college. I don't even think that even 1 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. It has a very old computer lab, and we will not even see it until the 3rd or 4th semester. It doesn't have a hostel for B.Tech students, and it only has a hostel for medical students, which means they will give us a hostel outside the campus, which is very bad. I am currently living in it.

admission_overview.college_name: Noida International University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Currently,Noida International University admission 2025is open. The university offers various courses such as BTech, MBBS, MBA etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the institutions also offer PhD courses. The admissions committee selects candidates on the merit of entrance examination/interviews which the Institute conducts. Admissions to the programmes offered atNIUhappen through NSAT (NIU Scholarship cum Admission Test) for technical programs or through GD/PI for non-technical programmes. The university also considers state-level and national-level entrance exams like JEE & CUET. Apart from this, the university offers more than full-time 25 courses in various streams such as Law, Design, Engineering etc.

The application process at Noida International University is an online procedure. However, candidates looking for PhD course admission need to sit and appear for the in-house entrance exam followed by PI. Read the following article to know more aboutNoida International University course admission2025.

The mode of study at Noida International University admission courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the university. The mode of study for the course is full-time. Read on to know more aboutNoida International Universitycourse admissions2025.

NIU admissions to all the courses is a mix of entrance exams or merit-basis. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. NEET,UP NEET
Noida International University admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation as per respective entrance exam scores. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at NIU:
STEP 1: Noida International University Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online or offline for various course admission at Noida International University. To apply online, candidates must apply online and to apply offline, aspirants must visit the official website. The application fee is INR 1,100. However, candidates can also check theNoida International University feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students are selected based on entrance exam scores such as NSAT, CUET, NEET etc. Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Are admissions into BSc courses at NIU still open in 2025?
faqs.answer: No, the BSc course admissions at NIU are no longer open in 2025. The BSc admissions at NIU are decided by the scores obtained by a candidate in the CUET entrance exams. The last date to register for the CUET exam ended in the month of March in 2025. The exam has already been concluded in the month of July. Candidates need to wait for the announcement of the CUET 2026 exam for BSc admissions at NIU.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Noida International University accept for admission to BCA?
faqs.answer: No specific entrance exam score is mentioned for admission to BCA at Noida International University.For BCA admission at Noida International University requires you to have completed their 10+2 with a minimum of 45% to 50% aggregate marks in Mathematics from any recognised board.Some of the top recruiting companies are IBM, Mother Dairy, and others.

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Noida International University?
faqs.answer: Noida International University once registration fees and application fees are paid are non-refundable. Candidates who paid fees for eserving a seat are non-refundable and non-transferable if they are less than the prescribed fee. Further, candidates can apply for a refund of programme fees by submitting an application in the prescribed format. The refund amount is deducted by 50% for administrative charges. Thecandidates are also required to return any NIU material, such as the ID card, confirmation letter, or self-learning material before leaving the university.

faqs.question: What is the fees in Noida International University for BSc?
faqs.answer: The total fee (tuition) for the BSc at Noida International University is 3.1 L - 7.1 L. The fee changes & depends on the level of competition & the available no. of seats. Students can reach the official site & check for the fee updates or click here

hostel_campus.college_name: Noida International University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Noida International University’s hostels offer students the choice of comfortable boarding facilities of single, double and triple rooms with AC and non AC options for both boys and girls. Every hostel has Wi-Fi facilities so that they can keep abreast with global events. If the boarding facilities speak of homely comfort than the dining facilities serves homely food. Scrumptious and healthy food prepared under strict hygienic conditions are served to the students during meal times.

library.description: Noida International University's Library has a collection of more than 30000 books and journals. This digital library is one of the biggest in Delhi NCR and is the pride of NIU as it has more than 1200 current International and National research papers relevant in all Schools and their respective fields.

A Committee comprising of a senior workforce and learner delegates has been constituted to take care of the issues of the cafeteria and to screen the administrations given to the clients.

paragraphs: Noida International University once registration fees and application fees are paid are non-refundable. Candidates who paid fees for eserving a seat are non-refundable and non-transferable if they are less than the prescribed fee. Further, candidates can apply for a refund of programme fees by submitting an application in the prescribed format. The refund amount is deducted by 50% for administrative charges. Thecandidates are also required to return any NIU material, such as the ID card, confirmation letter, or self-learning material before leaving the university.

Yes, NIU acknowledges merit of its students by offering generous scholarships in the form of fee waivers. These scholarships are only applicable to the tuition fees for first year. NIU has a tie-up with Punjab National Bank (PNB) for providing educational loans to its economically weaker students. For availing scholarships, candidates need to fill NSAT application form by paying an application fee of Rs 500+ GST, through debit card/ credit card/ net banking.

faqs.answer: A:    The placement is quite good at Government Medical College as all the students are given inhouse internship. The lowest package seems to be 30k. The job is given in any hospital. All the students get internships in the same government college. Candidates can choose any branch like surgery, radiology, etc. Each batch has 200 students, putting almost 800 students in college. Stipend of Rs.13,000 is paid for internships. After MBBS, a specialist degree in medicine or surgery can be taken like
faqs.question: Does Government Medical College, Aurangabad have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The average package for MBBS is around INR 6 to INR 7 Lakh Per Annum. However, for medical courses like radiology and pediatrics, the package varies from INR 25 to INR 30 Lakh Per Annum. The highest package offered at Government Medical College, Aurangabad is around INR 70,000 to INR 75,000 per month. Almost 100% of students were placed in Government Medical College, Aurangabad. All students got internships after completing the MBBS course.
faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Government Medical College, Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    70 to 80 percent of students get placed at Government Medical College, Aurangabad. The highest package is INR 12 lacs for MBBS students. However, the highest package offered at Government Medical College, Aurangabad varies depending on the course and branch of study. The highest package offered for medical courses like radiology and pediatrics is around INR 25 to INR 30 LPA. The highest salary offered to a medical officer is around INR 70,000 to INR 75,000 per month.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of GMC Aurangabad admission 2025 is online. Admission to various courses depends on the entrance exam scores and those who qualify for the exam will be eligible for counselling process of NEET. At the UG level, the college offers an MBBS course which is for four and a half years, a five-year BDS, a three-year BPMT course, and a four-year BSc. At the PG level, the college offers three-year MD in 14 specialisations and MS courses in six specialisations and a two-year PG diploma programme in seven specialisations. The college also offers a super-specialty course namely a three-year DM course. The below-mentioned are some of the courses offered by GMC Aurangabad and their respective eligibility and fee:

reviews_list.review_title: Much satisfied with overall objectives of the college.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students got placement. The lowest package seems to be 30k. We can get a job in any hospital, be it government or private. All the students will get internships in the same government college. We can choose any branch like surgery, radiology, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good and the infrastructure is also average. Different departments are there on different floors. Library is having a new infrastructure. For medical facilities, a hospital is in front of the college. Different labs are there for different departments.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides good clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of students complete the MBBS course within 4 years, and get good PG ranks in the desired field. Students need to secure a good rank to get selected here in the UG field. AIR in NEET should be around 13000 to get an admission here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility for the boys is decent as it is a government hostel. The infrastructure should improve in the coming years, and should benefit the students. The girl's hostel is better than the boys' for cleanliness and hygiene. Library facilities are very good, and air-conditioned libraries are available. The laboratories are very educative. They have all the necessary specimens, equipment, top-notch biochemistry, microbiology, and path laboratory.

individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Good placement. This is one of the best MBBS colleges and is strict in studies so getting good jobs and placement. The hostel is good and cleanliness is maintained. There is no water problem except in the summer. A separate hostel for boys and girls is available close to the college building.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBBS at Government Medical College, Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: The admission process for the MBBS programme at Government Medical College, Aurangabad:The National Eligibility and Entrance Test (NEET) UG is a required entrance test for Indian MBBS admissions. Candidates must take it.Interested parties must register for the exam and submit a NEET UG application.Following the release of the NEET UG results, aspirants are required to take part in the counselling process run by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC) for All India Quota seats and the Directorate of Medical Education and Research (DMER), Maharashtra, for state quota seats.Based on their NEET UG scores, candidates are required to select the colleges and courses they would like to take during the counselling procedure.The distribution of seats is determined by the NEET UG score, candidate preferences, and seat availability.

faqs.question: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?
faqs.answer: The NEET 2025 result is expected to be released in the first week of June 2025, within a month of conducting the exam. NTA does not announce the NEET result date in advance. Although last year the result date was stated to be declared on June 14, NTA released it 10 days in advance. Hence, there is no fixed date or schedule for NTA to declare the NEET result. Prior to the declaration of the result, NTA releases the final NEET answer key. Last year, NEET was conducted on May 5 and the result was declared June 4.

faqs.answer: At Government Medical College in Aurangabad, the MBBS placements are thought to be satisfactory . Graduates can apply for positions as medical officers in government hospitals or take the NEET-PG test to pursue further specialisation. Junior residents are said to receive a stipend of about Rs. 75,000 , while medical officers should anticipate a salary between Rs. 70,000 and Rs. 75,000 . GMCH Aurangabad internships are thought to be really helpful for developing into a qualified physician. Working in a variety of sectors and taking part in government initiatives that offer healthcare services to the impoverished, interns obtain practical experience.

What is the cut off for GMC Aurangabad?
description: GMC Aurangabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

GMC Aurangabad cutoff 2025 will be released in the form of opening and closing ranks. GMC Aurangabad MD and MS admission is based on the NEET PG score. Candidates preparing for GMC Aurangabad can refer to the table below for the last three years' GMC Aurangabad PG cutoff trends for various categories.

GMC Aurangabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13686 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

GMC Aurangabad MBBS cutoff 2025 was 13686 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 15779 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

GMC Aurangabad accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

GMC Aurangabad NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 22661 to 121258. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the GMC Aurangabad MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Geriatrics, followed by MD in Anatomy. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 22661 and 121258, respectively.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 23178.

NEET PG (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for Post-Graduation), is conducted for admission to various PG courses courses across the country. In this section, students can view the important dates for NEET PG Cutoff 2025.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

GMC Aurangabad NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 37 and 552, with M.Ch. being the highly sought-after course for admission.

GMC Aurangabad M.Ch. cutoff 2025 ranged between 37 and 552 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 37, M.Ch. in Head and Neck Surgery turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider M.Ch. in Gynecological Oncology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

Candidates appeared in the NEET SS entrance exam can refer to the table given below to view or download the consolidated round-wise cutoff PDFs. The cutoff PDFs are available round-wise for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure. Facilities are there with free Wi-Fi for students in the hostel and library. Good canteens and message facilities. There are ACs in all lecture halls. The campus of the college is big. There are many more facilities that are again evolving every year.

reviews.review_heading: This college is worth the knowledge and practice.
reviews.review_text: We have air-conditioned classes with projectors and a separate library building for self-study. We have many specimens and laboratories for each subject. The hostel is good and cleanliness is maintained. There is no water problem except in the summer. A separate hostel for boys and girls is available close to the college building.

reviews.review_heading: Much satisfied with overall objectives of the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and the infrastructure is also average. Different departments are there on different floors. Library is having a new infrastructure. For medical facilities, a hospital is in front of the college. Different labs are there for different departments.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility for the boys is decent as it is a government hostel. The infrastructure should improve in the coming years, and should benefit the students. The girl's hostel is better than the boys' for cleanliness and hygiene. Library facilities are very good, and air-conditioned libraries are available. The laboratories are very educative. They have all the necessary specimens, equipment, top-notch biochemistry, microbiology, and path laboratory.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library with facilities like free Wi-Fi, best seating arrangements, and air-conditioners. Our hostels are above average, and we get two-seater rooms in the first year, while we get single rooms in the 2nd year. Mess food is very nice. OPD facility is available for every student.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, my college faculty is good, and the infrastructure and patient exposure are really good.
reviews.review_text: There was Wi-Fi available in the hostel and library. Classrooms were good in the old building, but in the new building, classrooms were well-ventilated. In the hostel, reading room, library, and classrooms, ACs were also available. The food was okay. Sports and games were not conducted that much.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the food quality and quantity are very good. There are also changes in day-by-day foods, like sweets. There are different types of breakfast, so students don't get bored with breakfast. There is also a non-veg facility for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GMC Aurangabad - Government Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was the best. Renovations were going on. The college provided Wi-Fi access with fast browsing speeds. The college had a new library for reading with a seating capacity of 500 students. The college had a canteen and the food quality was one of the best that I had ever seen. There was a sports ground in the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best in academics in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided by the college which is a well-established college and hospital. It is quite old but as we know old is gold. The hostels are in a bad shape may be due to a government organisation running colleges and hospitals but they are better than many.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because it carries the category of a goverment college. A good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is large in size. The facilities are nice but not so excellent. Classrooms are having efficient space for 150 strength. Labs and practical rooms are spacious. Hostel rooms are good but sometimes we face water and electricity problems. Sports complex is there but not efficiently maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is good, and faculty is so friendly.

review_content.Placements: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes' B.Sc. in Medical Lab Science course has a total tuition and hostel fee of INR 350,000. In general, the starting salary for a B.Sc. in MLS ranges from INR 2 lakh to 5 lakh, but it can increase with experience to INR 10 lakh per annum. Salaries in private hospitals are usually higher than those in public institutions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is very advanced, and the college is also very good. They have a Wi-Fi system in class, and the teachers are helpful. However, the mess food is absolutely useless, while the canteen is good. There is a hospital nearby for medical emergencies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Always choose the better option to make your future bright.

review_content.Placements: There is around 120 seat in my batch, which is divided into two batches, A and B. The highest package is 5-7 LPA. The lowest is 1.5-2 LPA. The average is 1.75–2.25 LPA. Sun Pharma, Cipla, and many more are the top recruiters. It is compulsory to do an internship in pharmacy, and students do internships in the local pharmaceutical industry, and some are doing internships in Sun Pharma. We can become an analyst or DI (drug inspector).
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in the pharmacy department are good; there are 7-8 laboratories with fully equipped equipment; the college is fully Wi-Fi enabled; and 2 batches are in pharmacy A and B. The rating of hostel and mess food is very cheap; kindly opt for other options for upcoming students; the canteen is good; there is a hospital near Gyan Sagar College; the college has a basketball court, a badminton court, and also a gym. Gym is chargeable, around 500 per month.

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience of the college is really good, with teachers and facilities.

content.Placements: My course is BCA. Placements in our college are very nice in every course. There is 94% placements rate in our college, which is a really good rate. As I am from BCA, the main role I will get in future is in the technical field, like Software development, app development, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is also good for the whole college, with big, great buildings, and Wi-Fi in labs with AC. Also, the college canteen and mess are really good with great food taste, depending on the person's taste. It also has a separate sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good in terms of fees.

content.Placements: 3 batches are running the unique, super60, and non super60 from unique. Your placement is fixed, depending on your skills, but the average package is 5 to 6 LPA. It is under contract with the company. If you do not have skills, you will be fired after 1 year.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each department has its own dedicated laboratories, and the CSE/IT labs are equipped with updated systems, necessary software, and proper technical support. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and many are fitted with SMART boards to make teaching more interactive. The library is one of the strong points of the campus, offering a wide collection of textbooks, reference material, journals, and a peaceful space for self-study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Budget friendly college.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students secured good placements. The average package goes to 6 LPA, and the highest package goes to 50 LPA. Companies like Jio and Paytm are involved, and the college has several startups on campus as well, providing better industrial training.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are commendable, and they offer good Wi-Fi access; however, it is not available for first-year students. The college is very strict concerning the years, and they maintain rigorous educational standards. Additionally, they have an excellent mess and better IoT labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best review for SVIET College.

content.Placements: Overall, 80% of students are placed in our course with a lot of effort from our placement cell. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Caelius Consulting, Antier Solutions, Sensation Solutions, and Infosys. Most roles in our course like web development, MERN stack development, and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The library and labs are fully unbelievable, and the college provides the best facilities to students to get more focus on their studies due to the good environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is quite good, the food in the mess is of medium level, and the college also provides a canteen, along with sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and support of a faculty with strong placements.

content.Placements: Overall, the placement percentage is approximately 90%. They have secured placements in top companies. The highest package offered is up to 50 LPA. The average package offered by companies is 6.5 LPA. SVIET hatch attracted numerous estimated recruiters like Infosys, Wipro, IBM, Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc. Roles offered by companies are software developer, system engineer, data analyst, business analyst, network engineer, quality assurance engineer, consultant, etc. Approximately 70% of students have secured internships in companies like Infosys, Mamsys, Click lab, SQE Labs, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get into Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.Sc.Candidates passed B.Sc. in Anesthesia and OT from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.M.PharmaIn case candidates with valid GPAT Score are not available the seats shall be filled on the basis of inter-se-merit in qualifying examination.B.Sc.Candidates passed 10th in non medical with atleast mentioned marks in Physics, Chemistry, Math or medical with Math with atleast above mentioned marks and for reserved category minimum 40% marks are eligible to apply.B.ComCandidates passed 10+2 with atleast 45% and for reserved category minimum 40% marks in Commerce are eligible to apply.
OR
Candidates passed 10+2 with atleast 45% and for reserved category minimum 40% marks in Arts with two subjects out of commerce/Account/Math/Economics/Management are also eligible to apply.
OR
Candidates passed 10+2 with above mentioned marks with vocational subject of

placement_report.college_name: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. The institute recorded 96% placements for Engineering, 97% Pharmacy, 90% Business Management, 92% Computer Application and 91% Hotel Management placements for the batch 2024. The highest package offered during the Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes placements 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA , which was offered to the students of the BTech batch 2024. Further, the highest package offered to the MBA, MCA and HM batch 2024 stood at INR 24 LPA . The highest package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2024 stood at INR 28 LPA, whereas the highest package offered to the BCA batch 2024 stood at INR 6.2 LPA. The top recruiters of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes in 2024 included Amazon, TCS, Decathlon, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, Dabur, HDFC Bank, Accenture, Jio, Cognizant, etc.
SVGI Placement Highlights 2024

faqs.question: Is Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes good for placements?
faqs.answer: Yes , Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MBA, MCA, BPharma, etc. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 96% placements for Engineering, 97% Pharmacy, 90% Business Management, 92% Computer Application and 91% Hotel Management placements for the batch 2024. The the highest package offered during Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes placements 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA , which was offered to the students of the BTech batch 2024. Further, the the highest package offered to the MBA, MCA and HM batch 2024 stood at INR 25 LPA. The highest package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2024 stood at INR 28 LPA, whereas the highest package offered to the BCA batch 2024 stood at INR 6.2 LPA. The top recruiters of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes in 2024 includes Amazon, TCS, Decathlon, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Deloitte, Wipro, Dabur, HDFC Bank, Accenture, Jio, Cognizant, etc..

library.description: SVGOI has a very well equipped libraries for catering to the needs of students, research scholars and faculty in their respective streams. All libraries together has a stock of more than 30000 text and reference books, journals and magazines, information aids including news papers, market reports and many other necessary outputs. The library functions on an open access system for the faculty, staff and students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Snooker Table

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, Snooker Table

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Communication lab, Internet Labs

reviews.review_heading: Study hard to get qualified in semester exam in college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classroom are all good, but the hostel is very bad. Management increases the hostel price 5k by every year. Mess food is hygienic and unhealthy. I always go to the canteen and eat some other stuff rather than eating mess food. The ground is available for cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college and campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is in every lab and multiple libraries are available in our college. The quality of food is good enough for eating but not excellent, but the variety is different every day. The canteen is also present in our college. Multiple sports events take place every year.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good, and faculty is so friendly.
reviews.review_text: The course is very advanced, and the college is also very good. They have a Wi-Fi system in class, and the teachers are helpful. However, the mess food is absolutely useless, while the canteen is good. There is a hospital nearby for medical emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Always choose the better option to make your future bright.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure in the pharmacy department are good; there are 7-8 laboratories with fully equipped equipment; the college is fully Wi-Fi enabled; and 2 batches are in pharmacy A and B.
The rating of hostel and mess food is very cheap; kindly opt for other options for upcoming students; the canteen is good; there is a hospital near Gyan Sagar College; the college has a basketball court, a badminton court, and also a gym. Gym is chargeable, around 500 per month.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a computer lab, library, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi ground, kho ground, canteen, auditorium, big classrooms, different labs for different subjects, cricket ground, and some inter-college sports are also organized. Bike stuntmen also come once a year.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and almost 80% of facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are lacking by 40%. The quality of food in the mess is not too good, but the canteen offers very good food. Sports tournaments happen in our college for every game, but medical facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college and hostel facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel staff is always good. The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available for all departments. The quality of the hostel food is good. Sports sessions are conducted every Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, good placement in 2022, and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and buildings are very good with all the facilities. There is good maintenance on hygiene and provide full security and support. From time to time inter-hostel sports, DJ night, and various activities are done with full enjoyment. No students will be allowed to leave during classes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Swami Vivekanand Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories and classes are good in this college. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is enabled, and the food served in the mess is good. Medical facilities management is good, and the mess staff is good. I would recommend students to take admission in it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good to make your future bright.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good in our college with proper CCTV cameras. Our hostel also focuses on health and hygiene and for that washrooms are always clean. Our college also has a Wi-Fi facility. The food that is available in our mess is neither so good nor bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good with proper books in the library to read. Wi-Fi is available on the college campus well-equipped labs are provided. The hostel facility is also good with a proper management system. The hostel is equipped with a hostel warden and guards for students' safety.

reviews.review_heading: You can choose SVIET to choose the best.
reviews.review_text: There are good and well-designed facilities to support the lives of people from different parts of the world. The food is good, though we need to improve in sports. The facilities are excellent. We have a good pitch for football, cricket, basketball, and volleyball. The college organises tournaments within and from outside.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good faculty members and the department is growing as well.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, and hostel facilities are good as well but the maintenance was not good. The mess food was not good, and students complained about the management many times but there was no improvement in that so I had to leave the hostel during my 5th semester.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, it has good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available in my course is good. There are so many facilities in my hostel one room with 3 people can leave and a table chair and one almirah for one person and filter water are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for doing B.Pharma in Mohali Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with modern equipment like a smartboard, camera and projector. Laboratories are neat and clean, and a high-speed Wi-Fi facility is also available on the entire campus. Hostel facilities are also available in our college with average food quality. The library contains all the required books for this course.

college_info.college_name: AKU: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Rankings

highlights.summary: APJ Abdul Kalam University admissions 2026 will starts soon. Interested students are advised to frequently go to the official website to apply for the interested courses. The students must keep checking the official website to avoid missing the deadline for admissions.

college_info.intro: The popular programmes given by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University are BSc, BCA , and MBA. The courses are being offered in full-time mode. The students are taught the latest syllabus with practical experience. Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University offers UG programmes in BE, BSc, BCA, BPharma, BBA, and BCom. The duration of the UG courses is 3 years. Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University is also giving diploma programmes in various specializations such as Pharmacy, Fashion Design, PGDCA, and more. The total duration of the diploma programmes is 3 years. Some of the big companies which select students are Amdocs, Nestle, Pfizer, Technologies, and more for various roles. The MBA is a two year major in which students learn real-life skills with theory. It prepares the students for big roles in the corporate. The students can get into management roles in many areas like marketing, HR, finance, and more.

placements.overview: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University has a dedicated department of Training and Placements. This department trains the students in various verticals such as aptitude, group discussions, and mock interviews. The college invites reputed at regular intervals to polish the skillset of the students. The university gives soft skill training along with teaching technical skills. The students not only focus on the academics, but also on developing the essential soft skills. This boosts the personality of the students which makes them the right fit for major roles during placements. The top companies that recruit from Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University are written in the table below:

faqs.answer: A:     The best branch for B.Tech can be considered as B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering. It is a very demanding course in the market, so this gives an edge to nice placements. The fee for the course is INR 3.56 Lakhs for the 4-year course. The university offers 90 seats for the course. Admission is based on the rank obtained in JEE Mains.
faqs.question: Which branch is the best in B Tech from AKU - Dr. A.P.J Abdul Kalam University?

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing MA from APJ Abdul Kalam University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University has collaborated with various universities. These collaborations are done with foreign universities and colleges. The foreign links and tie-ups offer exposure to the students. The main aim of the collaborations is to train and upskill the students so that they can work and study across the world. This opens various opportunities for the students. It makes the students competent on a global level. It also facalitate cross-cultural partnerships between
faqs.question: Has Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University collaborated with any institutions?

faqs.answer: A:    The students of Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University gives a wide exposure to the students. It provides many opportunities to network and gain knowledge about courses and curriculum of foreign colleges. This helps them make a decision regarding higher education in these universities in the future. Thus, this offers a lot of help to the students who are looking to study abroad after completing education from Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University.
faqs.question: How does collaboration help the students at Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University provide a range of courses. The university offer courses at UG and PG levels. Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University courses are offered across various streams such as Engineering, Management and Pharma. The UG courses offered are , , , , , , , , and more. The work experience is preferred for UG and PG courses but is not mandatory. The students must have knowledge of the english language. To get admission into a PG course, the student must finish their UG degree from a recognized college. The students who want to get into the college must select course of choice and apply to confirm the seat.

faqs.answer: A:    When applying for admission to Dr APJ Abdul Kalam University's BCom course, applicants need to submit the applicable application/registration fee. Application fees for all the AKU courses are INR 500. The payment of the application fee has to be made via any online mode of payment, such as credit, debit card or net banking. However, it must be noted that the specified fee has been extracted from the official website and is still subject to change. Hence, it is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.Com at Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam University?

faqs.answer: A:    The fees for undergraduate and postgraduate courses will depend on the program. For B.Tech, the fees will be around Rs. 3 Lacs per annum, for MBA, the fee will be 4 Lakhs per annum and for M.Pharm, the fee will be 1 Lacs per annum. Depending on the number of seats available, the fees may be higher or lower.Visit the official AKU website to find the official fee details for UG & PG programs. The website may have a section for the fees. Contact the admissions office or the finance department of the university to get the latest fee information for your particular programme of your interest.
faqs.question: What is the fees for UG/PG courses at AKU - Dr. A.P.J Abdul Kalam University?

faqs.answer: A:    For B.Tech courses, candidates must have passed the 12th from Science stream with a minimum aggregate of 60% along with the qualification result of BCECE.  The cut off ranks for Abdul Kalam Technical University is really high and  if you want to take admission in Abdul Kalam University through JEE Mains your rank must be under 40K.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for B Tech and what is the minimum JEE Mains percentile required?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there this no entrance exam required to apply for the BSc programme at AKU. As per the APJ Abdul Kalam University official website, the selection of the candidates for the BSc programme is merit-based. Students who are interested in admission to APJ Abdul Kalam University BSc programme must have completed their Class 12 in Science stream from any recognised board. reviews.review_text: Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories, classrooms, and library were available. The food served in the hostel was not good. Canteen was also average.

reviews.review_heading: Not fully satisfied with studies and placements, and I hope our staff should work on it.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like labs, Wi-Fi, library and many more things that help us study easily. You can enjoy your studies and college life. If you are regular, then it will help you with future placements and exams.

reviews.review_heading: It is unworthy of your time, money and talents.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi isn't good for students. Mess is messy and the quality of food is below average. We have a poor sports and games faculty. Library is well maintained with all the books available. Classrooms are messy big and need a lot of improvement. Labs have similar issues with it.

reviews.review_heading: The college is worth joining and is good for personality development.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is superb, and it's one of the best infrastructures in entire India. The IIT professor, Mr N. Vyas has also assured it when he was invited as a guest for a function conducted in the seminar hall. Cleanliness is very good, and you will never feel bored with the atmosphere in the college. One can feel freshness on the campus as there are fragrant flowers, beautiful trees and butterflies. Hostels are huge and clean, and the hostel fee including food is around Rs. 1...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with facilites . placement are okay skilled ones are getting placements in good way
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not  completely worth for money but it's okay for learning but not for projects. Poor ranges leads to network issues that will affect the seminar, projects conducted by the students. Labs are good and silent to improve concentration.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good. Everything is available to students, including Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and many more. There is no canteen. There are no medical facilities. The infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Well maintained and most loved college for computer science in Indore.
reviews.review_text: All things are good included Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, Library and mess. Yes, all the facilities are available. Medical facilities are also good.

highlights.summary:
Coursera is a global online learning platform that offers anyone, anywhere access to online courses and degrees from leading universities and companies. It features many different subjects across a range of learning formats, such as courses, Specializations, Professional Certificates, degrees, guided projects, and tutorials.

Coursera courses are typically delivered through video lectures, supplemented by reading materials, quizzes, and assignments. The platform allows users to learn at their own pace, with many courses being self-paced while others follow a more structured timeline.

It has partnered with over 300 top global universities and companies, including Stanford, Duke, Illinois, Colorado Boulder, Google, IBM, Microsoft, Meta, to name a few. Coursera offers online learning through evidence-based online teaching. The average rating across the platform is 4.7/5 stars.

A number of courses offered by Coursera include peer-reviewed assignments, where students evaluate each other’s work, while there are other courses that offer instructor assessments.

reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Learning Experience: A relational database management system (RDBMS) is a collection of programs and capabilities that enable IT teams and others to create, update, administer and otherwise interact with a relational database. RDBMSes store data in the form of tables, with most commercial relational database management systems using Structured Query Language (SQL) to access the database. However, since SQL was invented after the initial development of the relational model, it is not necessary for RDBMS use.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty was very good. They provided assistance on time, and I completed that too on time. It helps me to learn all concepts related to this RDBMS The course curriculum was good. I learned a lot of things about relational database management systems because it is the most widely used system among organisations across the globe.

faqs.answer: A Specialization on Coursera is a structured series of related courses to help learners master a specific skill or subject area. Each Specialization consists of multiple courses that build on one another, delivering a comprehensive learning experience. In addition to the core courses, Specializations often include a capstone project, which is a practical application of the knowledge gained. Upon completing a Specialization, learners receive a certificate that can be shared on professional platforms such as LinkedIn or included in resumes, showcasing their commitment to continuous learning and expertise in a specific area. Specializations are designed to be flexible, allowing individuals to progress at their own pace, and are ideal for those looking to advance their careers, switch fields, or deepen their knowledge in a particular domain.

answer.text: Coursera Plus is a subscription service that gives limitless access to a big range of Coursera's catalog, including courses, specializations, and professional certificates, for a single annual fee. This is ideal for learners who may be taking multiple courses or programs throughout the year, as it reduces the cost per course.The payment for one specific course, specialization, or programme is made as individual course payments, as monthly subscription Therefore, this is the best alternative for learners who want to take only one or two courses without any long-term commitment. Coursera Plus does not include all courses; therefore, we recommend you to check the eligibility of a course before subscribing.

answer.text: A data Science master's degree is a relatively new graduate programme that integrates core concepts from mathematics, computer science, statistics, and information science. It equips students with the skills to extract insights from complex data sets and enhance operational and business processes. This degree is ideal for those looking to advance their careers in data Science or expand their expertise in areas such as machine learning, data visualization, and data mining. Graduates are prepared for roles like data scientist, data analyst, or data engineer, benefiting from the growing demand for data professionals in today’s job market.

faqs.question: What is Data Science Master's degree course on Coursera all about?

answer.text: Guided Projects on Coursera are practical, hands-on learning experiences designed to teach specific skills in a short time, typically 1 to 2 hours. Unlike traditional courses, Guided Projects focus on "learning by doing" and provide learners with step-by-step instructions in a virtual environment.Learners work on real-world tasks using tools and software directly in their web browsers, with no setup. For instance, you can build a dashboard in Excel or create a simple website using HTML and CSS in the Guided Project. It is suitable for anyone seeking quick, applicable knowledge in areas such as data science, business analytics, web development, coding, machine learning, etc.

college_info.intro:
Indus University Ahmedabad has various undergraduate, postgraduate & doctorate programs in Engineering, Pharmacy, Life and Basic Sciences, Agriculture, Business Management, Education, Law and Sciences & other fields. Some of prominent programs of university are BSc, BCom, BCom (Hons), BA LLB, BTech, MTech, MBA & several other programs in various specialisations including Aviation, Biomedical, Civil, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Cyber Security, Designing, and many more.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at Indus University. Indus University BTech programme here offers ten specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Computer Engineering, Information and Communication Technology (ICT), Metallurgical Engineering, Information Technology, and Mechanical Engineering. Also, the Indus University MBA programme here comes in many specialisations such as Integrated MBA, Dual Degree MBA (BBA + MBA), BBA, BCom (Honors) with ACCA UK, MBA, BBA in Aviation, and many more. Below are some of courses offered by Indus University & respective eligibility and Indus University fees:

faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for course admissions at Indus University?

faqs.answer: Indus University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of various national-level entrance exams such as GATE, MAT, CMAT, etc. To get admission at the Indus University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with a minimum of 45% aggregate.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Indus University?

faqs.answer: Yes, You can get direct admission on before the JEE-Mains and GUJCET result declaration on the basis of 12th marks which should be 45 percent above with equivalent to your respective subject. Admission to all the courses is both merit and entrance based. The university conducts its own entrance exams such as Indus-MAT and Indus-DAT for Management and Designing courses, respectively. There are other national-level entrance exams which are also accepted by the university.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission in Indus University?

faqs.answer: Indus University is a private university, where the university provides both undergraduate and postgraduate courses. For undergraduate courses, candidates have to score more than 50% aggregate in Class 12 boards. Application forms are generally made out in December on the official website of the University. Candidates can apply online for admission to their desired programme. Indus University accepts scores of various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Maib, CAT, MAT, CMAT and XAT, etc. Students must apply online and submit the form with the following documents:Photocopy of matric certificate for Diploma programTwo photocopies intermediate level marksheet and certificate for Bachelors programsTwo photocopies of bachelor’s degree and marks sheet or equivalent certificate for the Master’s Program.Two photocopies of a master’s degree and marks sheet or equivalent certificate for the M.Phil/P.Ph.D. Program.CNIC photocopy of student and father/mother.Photographs with white background (MANDATORY)

course_faqs.question: Is B.Com available in Indus University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BCom is available in Indus University. The BCom course is offered at UG-level lasting for three to four years. The Indus University BCom course is offered as an honors degrees. The BCom curriculum consists of a combination of core theory, laboratory exercises, and various types of courses. Admission to the BCom course is subject to a valid score in the last qualifying exam. Indus University BCom admission will be based on the merit lists.

overview_faqs.question: How long is the course duration of MBA at Indus University?
overview_faqs.answer: The MBA curriculum is a two year long educational format inclusive of the hands on experience and in detailed knowledge about the subject. The MBA course at Indus University stresses on overall growth of the students so that they are able to prepare for the professional outlook following the 2 year academic course.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indus University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: With an emphasis on academics and excellent study resources, Indus University provides MBA students with a positive educational experience. The university's facilities and faculty are first-rate. But unlike some other universities, Indus University has a smaller campus community, and job placement rates are mediocre, with a median salary of $3–4 Lacs annually. The institution offers admission based on graduation results and, in the event that there are open seats, through management quota. To choose the specialisation that best fits their objectives, prospective students should think about their hobbies and career goals.

review_summary.college_name: Indus University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I will recommend taking admission in Indus University.

content.Placements: Indus University placement is very good. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the lowest package is 7 LPA. They have the best placement in their segment. It is value for money.
content.Infrastructure: They have the best facilities. They have the best hostel in their segment. The hostel provides gym facilities, hygienic food, and playgrounds.
content.Faculty: Indus University has the best faculty. All faculty are good, intelligent, and skilled. The exam is very good. They include theory and practice. The exam level is medium. They have the best course. They have a specialization course like AIML.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Ahmedabad with the best placement.

content.Placements: The university has established itself as one of the premier institutions, not only in terms of academic excellence but also in securing the future of its students through 100% placement assistance. The commitment towards career development is evident from the first year itself, as the training and placement cell actively guides students with skill development, personality enhancement, and industry readiness programs.
content.Infrastructure: The university stands out not only for its placement record but also for its world class infrastructure, well designed courses, and comfortable hostel facilities. The campus is equipped with modern classrooms, digital libraries, well maintained laboratories, and advanced research centers that provide students with hands on learning experiences. Wi-Fi enabled zones, smart classrooms, and fully functional auditoriums make the academic environment engaging and interactive. Sports facilities, recreation centers, and green open space further add to the overall campus appeal.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: For education purposes, this is basically our Indus College.

content.Placements: It's a nice college, and placements are really not good, but you have to know the humanity and what people need for placement, and you have to visit this college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a college in the Racharda area, and all people come from home, hostel, and also PG students here. They come to study from outside the city and country. They really love the college, and the hostel is too good. There are two or three sharing rooms in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very helpful to us, and exams are given based on attendance. If attendance is low, then we will not be allowed to attend the exam. We also have events like playing games and mind games at the national level. People are very friendly, and the campus is so good for me.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and very friendly faculty.

content.Placements: There are so many courses in college, and all of them are taught with dedication and hard work by the teachers, along with the support of mentors. The placement records are very good. Big companies like Microsoft, Google, Apple, and many others are offering placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure, the canteen, etc. The security is also awesome, and most importantly, there is no ragging at all. All students are very nice and humble. The atmosphere for freshers is very good and trustworthy.
content.Faculty: Faculty of Indus tries to teach you in a very friendly nature. The teaching style is too friendly that even an average student can understand it in simple words. Most of the teachers have Ph.D. in their respective roles. The semester exams seem easy because of the teaching by the faculty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed with the poor faculty, fake placements, and average facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not high. Many students are unplaced. The highest package is 10 LPA. The average package ranges from 3-4 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2-3 LPA. No big brands come to hire students. Mostly small or local companies visit the college. There is no proper system for internships. Students have to find them on their own, and the college doesn't even give an attendance if we miss classes for our internships. No such top roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are nice and well-maintained. There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and it has only limited access for official work. The library is also decent. Hostel rooms are average. Food in a mess is sometimes tasty and sometimes not. I never saw a medical room in my college, so I do not have an idea about it. Sports facilities are great.

admission_overview.title: Indus University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Indus University admission is open for the academic year 2025-2026. The university offers courses in the stream of Engineering, Management, Science, Design, etc. The popular programmes at the university are BTech, MBA, BSc, BDes, BCA, etc. Indus University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of various national-level entrance exams such as GATE, MAT, CMAT, etc. Apart from this, Indus University also conducts entrance exams such as Indus-MAT, Indus-DAT, etc. Students can apply online on the official website of the university. More details around Indus University admission 2025 are given in the following article.

paragraphs: Indus University admissions start with online registrations. Further, candidates must qualify for the respective entrance exam and fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as per the courses. Check below the detailed steps for the Indus University admission process:
Step 1: Indus University Application Process

Indus University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the university for their desired programme. While filling the application form, they must submit the supporting documents of previous qualifications and pay an application fee for the respective UG & PG courses.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to Indus University is both merit and entrance-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, BDes, etc., candidates must qualify for national/ university-level entrance exams. However, the university offers direct admission to courses such as BSc, BCA, BCom, MSc, etc. For some courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, the university releases the list of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIndus University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into Indus University BTech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: 50% seats of the sanctioned strength of each course is Management Quota, admission of which is handled by the institute as per guidelines of ACPC. Minimum Aggregate 45% in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics, Theory exam in H.S.C. Students must have appeared in GUJCET exam.

faqs.question: How to take admission in the BTech course at Indus University?
faqs.answer: For getting admission in the BTech course at Indus University, the candidates need to register themselves with the ACPC by applying and filling up the online application with the requied details. After paying the application fee, the form should be submitted. The students are selected on the basis of merit for the 50% seat reserved. The other 50% seats are available for direct admission purpose.

faqs.question: What is the role of ACPC of Indus University for admission in the BTech course?
faqs.answer: The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) is a body that handles the admission process of BTech of the Indus University. It has set guidelines for the purpose of admission to both management quota and the normal seat.

Indus University JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Indus University.

Indus University GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 15086 to 50896. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General HS category, the Indus University B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 15086 to 50896, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Information and Communication Technology.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

library.description: Indus University spread across 600 Sqm, has a well stocked library with collection of over 26000 volumes of books besides subscriptions for more than 250 National and International Journals. It also possesses Electronic Resources on books, journals, project reports along with CDs and DVDs on specific topics of interest. One can also find reprographic facilities in the library. The library has an Online Publication Access Catalogue (OPAC) and institutional membership with ADINET and DELNET providing online access to a large number of e-books and e-journals.

review_content.General: About 70% of students are placed. The salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Around 100% of students got internships from our course in hospitals. I also try to open a pathology center to detect any diseases.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose MGM Institute of Health Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: MGM Institute of Health Sciences (MGMIHS), a deemed university in Navi Mumbai, is a strong choice for health Science education due to its strong reputation, experienced faculty, modern infrastructure, and focus on research and clinical exposure, along with its NAAC 'A+' accreditation and UGC recognition. MGMIHS has eleven constitutent colleges through which it offers UG and PG courses. The institute has a lush green campus with state-of-the-art infrastructure and laboratories equipped with cutting-edge tools which altogether provides us with good hands-on experience.

Some of the popular ones are BPharma, MBBS, BSc, MPharma, MSc, etc. PhD and fellowship courses are also offered at the institute. admission_process.title: MGM Institute of Health Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MGM Institute of Health Sciencesadmission processcan be done both online and offline. Students need to register with the institute by filling the application form. Further they might be required to appear for an entrance exam, if applicable for their preferred course. Follow the MGMIHS admission process explained below:
MGM Institute of Health Sciences Registration Process

Candidates must register themselves with the institute in order to apply for admission. This is the first step in the admission process. Application forms for all the courses are available online on the institute’s official website. If a candidate wants to apply offline, they can contact the admission office. The application form must be filled carefully by the candidate before the last date.
MGM Institute of Health Sciences Selection Criteria

After successfully registering with the institute, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam, if their preferred course requires. The entrance exams accepted by MGMIHS include MGM-CET and NEET. Candidates must score the required aggregate and appear for the counselling process for taking admission. While, they also can be granted admission on the basis of merit of class 12 or graduation, depending on the course specific selection criteria.

Once the exams have been conducted, results are declared and counselling process is completed, candidates are selected based on their merit of the exam or class 12/graduation. If they clear all the criteria, there are selected and informed via email or call. However, for confirming the seat, candidates must pay the tuition fee or a certain amount.

MGM Institute of Health Sciences feesincludes tuition fees, hostel fees, mess and other charges. The institute also provides placements to candidates in various companies and hospitals. InMGM Institute of Health Sciences placements, the median package offered toUG studentsranged betweenINR 5 LPA and INR 13.2 LPA. ForPG courses,themedian packageoffered during MGM Institute of Health Science placements 2022 ranged betweenINR 12 LPA and INR 24 LPA,respectively. faqs.answer: Yes, MGM Institute of Health Sciences offers lateral to the BPharm course. Candidates should have passed the Diploma in Pharmacy examination from PCI approved institution in Maharashtra or outside Maharashtra to apply for BPharm (LE) course. Admission to the programme is merit-based.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharm at MGM Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed HSC examination or its equivalent examination withPhysics, Chemistry and Biology or PCM group and English as one of the subjects are eligiblet o apply for MGM Institute of Health Sciences BPharm course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, aspirants must also hold a valid score in MGM CET, followed by PI round.

faqs.question: What is the fee of studying D.Pharma at MGM Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of studying DPharma at MGM Institute of Health Sciences is INR 2.2 lakh. The overall fee includes other components also like hostel, mess and some other fee. Candidates must pay the tuition fee or a certain amount to confirm their admission and secure their seat after getting selected.

faqs.question: Can I join MGM Institute of Health Sciences directly?
faqs.answer: MGM Institute of Health Sciences, offers merit and entrance- based admission to all the courses. The offers admission based on the last-qualifying exam for admission to any UG, PG and PhD courses. Additionally, college may also acceptMGMCETentrance exam, followed by PI round. Further, to be eligible for courses, candidates must have passed Class 12 for UG courses, pass graduate degree for PG courses and master's degree for PhD courses.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance for admission to MGM Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: MGM Institute of Health Sciences offers merit and entrance- based admission to all its courses. The college conduct MGMCET for admisison to all its courses. Further, to be eligible for admission, candidates are required to complete the basic criteria set by the college for admission. For instance, UG candidates are required to pass Class 10, PG and PhD candidates must pass a graduation and masters's degree, respectively from a recognised university to apply for admission.

faqs.question: How can I apply for admission at MGM New Bombay College of Nursing?
faqs.answer: MGM New Bombay College of Nursing offers admission based on merit. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. The MGM New Bombay College of Nursing application window is open. interested students can apply directly through the official website.

faqs.question: How costly is MGM Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: MGM Institute of Health Sciences offers UG and PG across Medicine, Nursuing, Paramedical, and others. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 60,000- INR 95 lakh.
