reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 19 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a nice institute for optometry.
reviews.review_text: An ample amount of space was provided in our department which could accommodate enough people and different optometry instruments. There were different rooms for lectures, optometry clinic, etc. A total of three canteens were available in our institute so if anyone wanted to stay in the hostel, they always had options.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 3 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am truly satisfied with the faculty members and facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of well-equipped labs of respective departments of Biochemistry, Microbiology, and Pathology. There is more practical work involved, which gives students hands-on experience of everything. The library has a vast collection of books and journals of each author and also includes story books. There is a separate section for each subject that includes all the books that are required within the curriculum and out of syllabus books are also included to deepen our understanding and...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 3 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has comprehensive learning and practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: MGM Institute of Health Sciences offers excellent facilities to support students' academics and practical learning. It has well-equipped laboratories, libraries, and AC classrooms with projectors. It also has more than 4 canteens on campus, which provide good healthy food in a clean environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 2 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied and happy to be the part of this institution.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. There are classrooms, and a library to study and to refer books. The food and canteens are clean and healthy. The hostels are safe and good. Annual sports are held on the campus every year. It also welcomes us to participate in the Olympic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 1 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: There are classroom and library facilities. The hostel provides quality food and a comfortable life. The university focuses on well-being and encourages students in sports and other activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 21 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My Incredible journey in MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with library, lecture room, anatomy hall, various laboratories. Clean and hygienic canteen for food. Separate hostels for girls and boys with good security. Clean and tasty mess food. Excellent medical facilities. Supports sports and physical education.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 21 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College life in MGM School of Biomedical Sciences is excellent in terms of academics and clinical.
reviews.review_text: Clinical exposure with patients is extremely appreciable. The Dialysis Department has a total of 16 machines, 9 for OPD, 2 for positive patients, and the remaining 5 are placed in respective ICUs for B.Ed-side dialysis of critically ill patients. Overall, exposure is excellent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 21 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Great opportunity and absolutely satisfied with MGMSBS, overall an excellent choice.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure with a well-maintained library, books, previous year’s question papers, a central canteen with hygienic food, anatomy museum, dissection hall, pathology, biotechnology, and physiology labs. Proper classrooms with AC and projectors. Separate girls’ and boys’ hostels with proper in-charge and security. Overall, medical facilities are excellent. Every year, exuberance is conducted with exciting sports, cultural events, games, and many more.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by MGM Medical College and Hospital, AurangabadReviewed on 8 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good hospital, patient flow is good, and also infrastructure and faculty members are also good.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and the hospital is well-equipped. The hospital is a tertiary care center, so it has almost all care facilities. The college has a very good library and a skill lab with mannequins so that students can practice clinical procedures.The hostel has quite good facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with seniors, as they help us a lot in almost everything.
reviews.review_text: From the 3rd semester, we were posted to different departments like Oncology, Gynecology, Cardiac, etc. and we started learning the practical part too. During the 4th year, we don't need to buy any books, as there is a library equipped with many books for students and can easily borrow books. Hostels are not worth it, it's too expensive. Canteen facilities are good and loved by students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, AurangabadReviewed on 14 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college, the campus is just epic, and the placement is also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available at the college are top-notch. There are nearly all the facilities available in the college, like a very big library, computer rooms discussion rooms and free Wi-Fi. The quality of the food in the canteen is not that good as compared to other colleges but it is still edible.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by M.G.M. School of Physiotherapy, AurangabadReviewed on 4 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Bachelor of physiotherapy curriculum at MGM.
reviews.review_text:
There are good-quality classrooms, but not like at the medical college, where only the department has the classrooms. 
library is good. But I don't have access to the central library. 
The quality of the hostel is average, and the food is above average.
No extra sports period are available but it is only available during college festival.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 19 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Thorough course structure, really good and understanding mentors, overall a good choice.
reviews.review_text: It is a really good college via infrastructure and pretty huge too. The benefit is that there are a variety of people doing a bunch of different courses, so it is a it is a good place to increase connections and build networks with people from varying medical fields. Good library facility.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 18 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Provides great exposure by posting at different multispecialty hospitals and also has good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the facilities are good. The library is spacious, with e-library services and good books related to the subject. Classrooms are well built. Auto stands, bus stand and railway stations are nearby, which reduce travel expenses. A bus is also provided by the college in the morning and evening to and from the station.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by MGM School of Biomedical Sciences, Navi Mumbai, MGM Institute of Health SciencesReviewed on 18 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Amazing real-life experience and training to strive for the best!
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are adequately built, along with projectors and air conditioning, to provide the best learning experience. The libraries are stocked with relevant reading material, and the staff is extremely helpful and supportive. The canteen also provides us with healthy and affordable meal options.

college_info.college_name: HNBGU Uttarakhand: Admission 2026, Courses, Fees, Placements

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for HNBGU admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.particular: No. of affiliated institutes/ constituent units

college_info.intro:
HNBGU offers BTech. MSc & BSc courses at the UG and PG level. Students looking for course admission must complete Class 12 or graduation as per the course requirements. Candidates looking for BTech admission must meet eligibility criteria set by university. Students should pass Class 12 with 45% aggregate (Physics, Chemistry and Maths). PCM should be compulsory subject. However aspirants who belong to reserved category must complete Class 12 with 40% aggregate.
Admission gets confirmed after fee payment to Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University. There are multiple fee components like security deposit, tuition fees. For MBA programme candidates must pass graduation with a 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST). Students can check HNBGU popular programme 2026 in table presented below:

Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Some students found placement process useful, some didn't
Not very active
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is approved by the UGC and given a "A" grade by NAAC. HNBGU provides more than 700 undergraduate, graduate, certificate, and doctorate courses in 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments, and 2 centres (Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, and Law).The median package provided during the HNBGU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.90 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA, respectively, accordi
faqs.question: What is the highest placement in HNBGU?

faqs.answer: A:    According to HNBGU overall NIRF report 2024, a total of 84 students were placed and 1,305 students opted for higher studies out of total 2,706 students during UG 3-year placements 2023. Further, the course-wise number of students placed over the past three years during HNBGU placements is presented below:Particulars Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2021)Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2022)Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2023)Total students263266248Students placed556

faqs.answer: A:    HNBGU MBA 2023 placements report is not available as of now. However, the university NIRF report is out. faqs.question: How are the placements for MBA at HNBGU?

faqs.answer: A:    HNBGU Uttarakhand has a fee structure for each of its programme that consists of multiple components. Some of these fee components are tuition fee, security deposit, etc. The MBA tuition varies at HNBGU campus and the affiliated colleges. Hence, teh HNBGU Uttarakhand MBA fee range from INR 40,000 to INR 7. lakh. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the course fees for two years MBA in HNBGU Uttarakhand?

faqs.answer: A:    HNGBU admission 2025 to various courses is based on CUET 2025 scores followed by counselling. HNBGU Uttarakhand accepts CUET-UG scores for admission to BSc, BPharm, BCom, BTech, BA, BHM, Integrated MSc, BCA, BBA, and BA LLB courses. Candidates whose names appear in the merit list are eligible to pay the admission fee for provisional admission.
faqs.question: What all courses of HNBGU accept CUET UG scores for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from 2nd April 2026 to 9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.
faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?

faqs.answer: A:    CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination is CBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.

faqs.answer: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University offers admission to candidates mainly based on CUET scores of the candidates. faqs.question: How are the placements at HNBGU?

answer.text: The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is approved by the UGC and given a "A" grade by NAAC. HNBGU provides more than 700 undergraduate, graduate, certificate, and doctorate courses in 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments, and 2 centres (Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, and Law).The median package provided during the HNBGU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.90 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA, respectively, according to the HNBGU overall NIRF report for 2023. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dolphin (PG) Institute of Biomedical and Natural Sciences.

content.Placements: Many students get placed here. A minimum of 30% of students are placed here. The package offered in this course was so high. Many companies arrive here, and many students get internships from here, so you must take admission here. There is such a good environment and pace.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, and the department is too. Wi-Fi is available, labs are good, classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is extensive. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports are good. Games happen on a daily basis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.

content.Placements: I am studying at RIT Roorkee. As a student, I think it is a good college for students. Academics are very good. They teach us very well. Companies visit the college, and seniors are also placed. The salary package offered ranges from 8-12 LPA. If students keep grinding, then they will crack the job from here.
content.Infrastructure: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the review of my Bachelors degree.

content.Placements: There were few students in my course/department who got placed. The highest package offered in my course was 5 or 6 LPA. The lowest package offered in my course was 2 LPA. Average package offered in my course was around 3 LPA. Very few students got internship in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were very poor in my course/department. Ex – Wi-Fi was not available for students in my course/department. Labs were not good at all. Classroom was not up to the mark. All books were not available in the library. Canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games were not good at all.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Really sounds like college and is worth joining.

content.Placements: The placement rate is good compared to other colleges, which have high fees and no placement. The highest package recently is around 24 LPA in MBA, and around 80 percent of the students got placed from the outgoing batch. The internships are provided by the college according to the course from time to time.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is well designed for the convenience of the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and there are 2 libraries for the students. The food provided is very good in comparison to any canteen or mess, and the hostel facilities provide for the sports and fitness of the students.

admission_overview.college_name: HNBGU Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility & Last Date, Application Form

paragraphs: HNBGU admission 2025to its three campuses (Srinagar, Pauri and Tehri) is bothentrance and merit-based. The University accepts CUET-UG entrance test scores for admission to undergraduate and integrated courses. In addition, the CUET-PG score is also accepted forHNBGU PG admissions. Apart from this, the University also admit students based on scores obtained in national-level examinations conducted by different authorities such as JEE Main, CAT, MAT, and UGC NET, among others.

Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal Universityoffers756 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses across 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments and two centres(Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, Law).

The university offers courses across various streams such as Design, Engineering, Law, IT & Software, Science, etc.HNBGU course admissionsare through the CUET exam for courses offered at the Srinagar campus. Aspirants are advised to check the required qualifications before applying to any course. The table given below mentionsHNBGU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection details:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Class 12 or equivalent pass from any recognized Board/University withPhysicsand Mathematics as a compulsory subject along withChemistry, obtained at least 45% aggregate (40% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together
CUET-UG/JEE Main+ Counselling
Download:HNBGU Brochure

There are multiple components included in theHNBGU feessuch as tuition fee, hostel fee, registration fee, sports fee, etc. The university provides relaxation in the required minimum marks to the reserved category candidates. Tabulated below are the course-wise fees for HNBGU:
Course Name
Tuition Fee (Investment)
Average Package (Return)

**The seat intake is as per the official website/sanctioning body.
Some of the important pointers about the HNBGU fee refund are presented below:
The seat allotment is carried out based on seat availability and candidates' score in the accepted exam. Tabulated below are the course-wise seat intake for HNBGU:
Course Name
Seat Intake
Note:The above-mentioned fee is sourced from official sources/concerning bodies, hence, is indicative.

TheHNBGU admission processinvolves online registration, shortlisting of students, release of merit list, seat allotment, document submission, and admission fee payment. Selection for most of the courses is done based on merit in the accepted exam (CUET-UG/CUET-PG/JEE Main, etc.). Below are the steps forHNBGU admission:
STEP 1: HNBGU Application Process 2025

The university accept applications via online mode. Eligible candidates can visit its official website (hnbgu.ac.in) to fill out the form. All the details should be filled out carefully in the application form. In addition, the application form must be submitted on or before the prescribed deadline.
STEP 2: Selection & Shorting of Students

After the conclusion of the application process, the university shortlists students based on scores in the accepted exam. HNBGU CUET merit list shall be published further to declare the names of the selected candidates. Candidates who make it to the selection list become eligible for admission to further selection round/seat allotment.
STEP 3: Counselling

Counselling is held after the CUET merit list is declared for theHemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University course admissions. This admission round is generally conducted for admission to the BTech lateral entry programmes. Admission to some of the courses offered by university-affiliated colleges can also be through a counselling process.
Take a freeCUET Mock Testnow!!
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates who are allotted a seat in the counselling round can pay the admission fee. After document verification and fee payment, admission is confirmed.

Aspirants with a valid bachelor's degree in 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST) are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: Is CUET PG score required for HNBGU MBA admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes,HemvatiNandan Bahuguna Garhwal University MBA admission is based on merit in CUET-PG exam. Thus, aspirants need to have a valid score to get a seat. Check out theCUET-PG dates. Moreover, it is also crucial that the applicant meet the prescribed eligibility criteria. Aspirants with a valid bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST) are eligible to apply for the PG course.

faqs.question: Which MBA specialisations are offered by HNB Garhwal University?
faqs.answer: HemvatiNandan BahugunaGarhwal University offer two-year MBA programme in two specialisations. The offered streams are Business Management and Tourism & Travel Management. Admission to both the programmes is based on CUET scores. Candidates are advised to check out the required educational qualifciation before applying for the course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for admission in HNBGU Uttarakhand B.Ed course?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for HNBGU B.Ed course admission, aspirant should have a validBachelor's or PG degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate or Bachelor's degree in Engineering and specialisation in Science and mathematics with a minimum of 55% aggregate are eligible for admission. The degree should have been issued by a recognised university. Candidates also have to submit the educational certificates for verification purposes (original/scanned copies).

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get HNBGU?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to HNBGU must have a valid Uttarakhand NEET scores. Meanwhile, as per theHNBGU cutoff 2024stood at323372for BDS course. So, candidates are advised to achieve a rank below than 323372 for the admission to HNBGU.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get HNBGU?
faqs.answer: HNBGU accepts Uttarakhand NEET scores for admission to the BDS and MDS specialisations. Candidates with a valid Uttarakhand NEET UG scores will be eligible to participate in the counselling rounds. As per theHNBGU cutoff 2024for UG and PG courses, the required cutoff range stood between7465and710628for the General AII India category candidates. So, candidates seeking admisison to HNBGU must try to secure a rank under this cutoff range to be eligible for the admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNBGU)?
faqs.answer: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University offers admission to candidates mainly based on CUET scores of the candidates. The university accepts CUET-UG for BTech, BA, BPharm, etc. and CUET-PG for most of the PG courses. Aspirants are allotted seat via CUET Counselling after the release of merit. Hence, direct admission is usually not offered at HNBGU.

faqs.question: When do admissions begin at HNBGU?
faqs.answer: HNBGU Uttarakhand course admission is based on merit in the CUET exam for most of the programmes. Hence, the aspirants need to keep themselves updated with theCUET-UG datesandCUET-PG dates. All the important dates for the national-level exams are published on the NTA official website. The admission notification for HNBGU is released after the release of CUET results.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at HNBGU?

Out of 876 Indian universities, Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is rated 120th.The Mechanical Engineering Department offers Four years Under Graduate programme in Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech).Intake for admission in B.Tech course-B.Tech (ME) in-take 35B.Tech. placement_data.title: HNBGU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to HNBGU overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.4 LPA and INR 5.48 LPA , respectively. Further, as per Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University Pharmacy NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during HNBGU BPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 2.04 LPA . In addition, 15 students were placed and 20 students opted for higher studies out of 62 students during HNBGU BPharm placements 2023.

faqs.question: How are the placements at HNBGU?
faqs.answer: According to HNBGU overall NIRF report 2024, the key highlights of HNBGU placements 2023 as compared with 2022 and 2021 are presented below: Particulars Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2021) Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2022) Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 2.5 LPA INR 2.9 LPA INR 2.4 LPA Total students 263 266 248 Students placed 55 61 73 Students opted for higher studies 12 22 47 Particulars Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2021) Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2022) Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 5 LPA INR 5.2 LPA INR 5.48 LPA Total students 1396 1382 1214 Students placed 24 88 158 Students opted for higher studies 18 32 128

faqs.question: What is the highest placement in HNBGU?
faqs.answer: The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is approved by the UGC and given a "A" grade by NAAC. HNBGU provides more than 700 undergraduate, graduate, certificate, and doctorate courses in 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments, and 2 centres (Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, and Law). The median package provided during the HNBGU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.90 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA, respectively, according to the HNBGU overall NIRF report for 2023. In addition, during the Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University BPharm and MPharm placements 2022, the median compensation package was INR 1.8 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How are the placements for MBA at HNBGU?

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dolphin (PG) Institute of Biomedical and Natural Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, and the department is too. Wi-Fi is available, labs are good, classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is extensive. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports are good. Games happen on a daily basis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Roorkee Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.
reviews.review_text: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by HEC Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is the review of my Bachelors degree.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were very poor in my course/department. Ex – Wi-Fi was not available for students in my course/department. Labs were not good at all. Classroom was not up to the mark. All books were not available in the library. Canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games were not good at all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really sounds like college and is worth joining.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well designed for the convenience of the students, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, and there are 2 libraries for the students. The food provided is very good in comparison to any canteen or mess, and the hostel facilities provide for the sports and fitness of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Many students got placed.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, the department is too good, Wi-Fi is available, the labs are good, the classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is available. Medical facilities are available at any time, sports are good, and games happen on a daily basis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by HEC Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of my college (course).
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my course/department are very bad. My college is very small. There are no specific labs in my course/department. No Wi-Fi is provided by the college. Very few sports and games occur in my college. No medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Alpine Group of InstitutesReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Alpine College is good choice, looking for quality education, practical exposure and career support.
reviews.review_text: Library and labs are clean and good. Although the campus is compact, it is quite good and green, and the hospitality of the campus staff is also nice. I live in a hostel and the hostel rooms are quite spacious and good and the food is also nice. The fees for the hostel are also value for money.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Roorkee Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well, according to me, this college is okayish. You may or may not consider this.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite good, and the food is also decent. But some find it not up to the mark. Food quality is average, but on the better side, as compared to other colleges. Students are encouraged to take part in co-curricular activities rest is upto them whether they want to participate or not.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Roorkee Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 19 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure has developed over the last two years, and placements also show good signs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not good when I got admission, but after my admission, I saw that the college gives funds for labs and even for canteens and libraries. The hostel facilities are top-notch, and the girls' hostel facilities are also top-notch. Labs are in very good shape, and new labs open every month with new laptops and equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and course facilities are too good. The department is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, and the department is too. Wi-Fi is available, labs are good, classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is nice. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports are good, with games happening daily.

reviews.review_heading: Campus has very good facilities, labs, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, labs are here, infrastructure is good, and all lab components are available. Wi-Fi and library are available. The campus canteen is also available. Must come here if you want to study. Medical facilities are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dolphin (PG) Institute of Biomedical and Natural Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, the department is too good. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good. Classrooms are well-equipped library is good. Medical facilities are available anytime sports are good, and games happen on a daily basis.

reviews.review_heading: Hemvati Nandan University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Classrooms were big in size. The library had accommodated thousands of books. The quality of the facilities in the hostel was also good. The sports and games complex was available. A medical facility was also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Doon Business SchoolReviewed on 9 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Exceptional infrastructure and course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of DBS Global University is impeccable, with free Wi-Fi available for the students, air-conditioned classrooms, a 2-storied library, labs with quality desktops, and a smart teaching board in each classroom. The girls' hostel has good and safe facilities, such as daily medical consultations, a separate building for sports and indoor games. The mess food is also hygienic and homely. The hostel also has free gym facilities, 24/7 Wi-Fi, water cooler on each floor, and an elevator.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent academic environment with supportive faculty and strong placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, labs are here, infrastructure is good, all lab components are available, and Wi-Fi and library are available in the campus canteen. Must come here if you want to study. Here, medical facilities are also available.

college_info.college_name: HNBGU

data.description: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University features generally experienced & qualified faculty with many holding PhDs & specialised degrees. Students often describe them as supportive & helpful providing guidance beyond classroom. Faculty spans diverse departments in sciences, humanities & professional courses.

college_info.college_name: HNBGU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University extends a range of scholarships as a means of financial assistance to its students.

These scholarships allow students to continue their education with reduced financial burden. These scholarships and fee concessions cover the tuition fees & other expenses helping students focus on their studies.
Also, these scholarships encourage the meritorious students to continue working harder.

Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University provides many scholarships for students primarily targeting those from economically disadvantaged backgrounds especially below the poverty line. Eligibility generally requires being full time student, providing income certificates & not currently receiving other financial aid.
Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University offers scholarships to its students under the below-listed categories:

HNBGU Uttarakhand has a fee structure for each of its programme that consists of multiple components. Some of these fee components are tuition fee, security deposit, etc. The MBA tuition varies at HNBGU campus and the affiliated colleges. Hence, teh HNBGU Uttarakhand MBA fee range from INR 40,000 to INR 7. lakh. This fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_content.Placements: Dr NTR University of Health Sciences Vijayawada video Procgs. No. 951/A2/2015 Dt. 20.09.2016 has granted provisional affiliation for starting of 1st Year MBBS course for academic for the academic year 2016-17 and permitted to make admissions at Apollo Institute Of Medical Sciences And Research, Chittoor with an intake of 150 students for the academic year 2016-17 as per rules.
review_content.Infrastructure: The 850 bedded Chittoor Government district Hospital is now taken over and administered by Apollo Institute of Medical Sciences & Research, Chittoor. The new upgraded has state of art facilities with ICUs, casualties, and Labs of International Standards for students to get hands-on experience. The hospital covers over 21 disciplines of Medical & Surgical specialities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college is beautiful and beneficial for students.

review_content.Placements: I get admission into this college after qualifying NEET exam. After passing out students get into internships program in the general government hospital of Chittoor which in itself is a great resource to learn from. Since it is a government hospital students came across a variety of patients daily which trains the student more efficiently.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are air-conditioned and well-digitalised with powerpoint projectors which make the classes a lot more interactive. It provides well-maintained laboratories and a dissection hall, a large library, and a study room. The hostels are very well maintained with regular cleaning. Rooms are well-equipped with cots, cupboards, study tables, and window screens. They also provide an option for an air-conditioned room.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Facilities are good and the best faculty for medical students.

review_content.Placements: There is not only mbbs course offered but also a lot of courses are available like B.Tech, AHS course , physiotherapy etc. Internship is available for medical students in the Chittoor government hospital with a lot of patient flow. There are 150 seats for mbbs students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Canteen is available, playground available for cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, basketball with a cafeteria. Classrooms have central AC. The library is also available and they even sell books for mbbs students. Hostels are both AC non AC. Mess is there for both north side students and south side students.

review_summary.college_name: Apollo Institute of Medical Sciences and Research, Chittoor Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A private college with benefit as government college that provides very good clinical exposure.

content.Placements: The MBBS course is a four-year program that includes a compulsory one-year rotating internship. The college provides internship facilities in government hospitals in Chittoor, which is a great benefit to students. Most private colleges in Andhra Pradesh are affiliated with government hospitals, which gives students more clinical exposure.
content.Infrastructure: Each year, each subject has separate labs, demo rooms, and museums. The well-established library has all editions and all books related to the course. Study rooms for boys and girls are open 24/7 and are secure. There is a mess and canteen that provides chicken twice a week. The playground has separate courts for cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball. A physical education teacher is assigned to oversee sports.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is personally very good, and teachers are qualified. Faculty and lab facilities are good.

content.Placements: About 150 students are there in our course, mostly of them nearly 139 members have passed and they will get internships. Every student will get an internship as it is an MBBS course.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is available. The library is available up to 12 pm. There are many chances to learn everything, and there are manipulatives which are useful for our training.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified and are more useful and helpful. They usually conduct seminars and SDL to make sure we students learn something. There is no bad behavior from teachers.

The degree should be in a relevant field such as botany, zoo

reviews.review_heading: A private college with benefit as government college that provides very good clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Each year, each subject has separate labs, demo rooms, and museums. The well-established library has all editions and all books related to the course. Study rooms for boys and girls are open 24/7 and are secure. There is a mess and canteen that provides chicken twice a week. The playground has separate courts for cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball. A physical education teacher is assigned to oversee sports.

reviews.review_heading: College is personally very good, and teachers are qualified. Faculty and lab facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available. The library is available up to 12 pm. There are many chances to learn everything, and there are manipulatives which are useful for our training.

reviews.review_heading: I am unsatisfied only due to food but rest all are excellent.
reviews.review_text: The 850 bedded Chittoor Government district Hospital is now taken over and administered by Apollo Institute of Medical Sciences & Research, Chittoor. The new upgraded has state of art facilities with ICUs, casualties, and Labs of International Standards for students to get hands-on experience. The hospital covers over 21 disciplines of Medical & Surgical specialities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is beautiful and beneficial for students.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are air-conditioned and well-digitalised with powerpoint projectors which make the classes a lot more interactive. It provides well-maintained laboratories and a dissection hall, a large library, and a study room. The hostels are very well maintained with regular cleaning. Rooms are well-equipped with cots, cupboards, study tables, and window screens. They also provide an option for an air-conditioned room.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good and the best faculty for medical students.
reviews.review_text: Canteen is available, playground available for cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, basketball with a cafeteria. Classrooms have central AC. The library is also available and they even sell books for mbbs students. Hostels are both AC non AC. Mess is there for both north side students and south side students.

reviews.review_heading: Finally, I suggest that students join this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very nice for students. Classrooms are good, and there is a library available with a very good collection of educational books. Hostels are very good and are maintained cleanly. A mess is available for all the students. Every year, there is a sports day for students of all courses. Every student participates in games, and there are facilities for sports like badminton, cricket, and basketball. There are also intermedics events with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good and suggest everyone, I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and the infrastructure of hostels and classrooms is so good. Labs are fully equipped, and classrooms have full ventilation, AC, projectors, and other facilities like speakers, etc. The food quality in the mess is good compared to other hostels, and the canteen facilities are also good. Sports and cultural activities are so good.

reviews.review_heading: Bit costly for studies but the quality of teaching is perfect.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully functional and fully advanced machines are available in college. Wi-Fi is also available on college campuses. Classrooms are also different for adjacent batches but only a few classrooms are a bit dull and smaller. The library with all types of medical books available. The quality of food is average. The canteen food is tastier than mess food but it is cost high. Sports and games are held weekly.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in my college .
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are not bad and the infrastructure are few are spending and some are going through the things should be developed more in the college and the facilities are best in the college according to the hostel rooms and the classrooms are under AC and the faculty is also very good and they are giving their best in the teaching and the canteen also provided and there is a clinic is also there for the students and sports also provided by the management for the students sake on...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good at all.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good and teaching if good library, study room separate, hospital Near infrastructure is good and teaching if good library, study room separate, hospital nearyYes, helpful and are qualified and knowledgeable 
Yes
Moderate difficult.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best place to study.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel block are situated in a compound, and this area is named Sakethapuram. We also have a temple here. Many badam trees are all around the college, which gives cool air. Our college building is well built with all the safety measures. Hostels are also built with good quality. Elevators are also arranged.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private medical college with government hospital for great clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: In the 1st year, we had histology labs, physiology labs and anatomy dissection halls for studying about the dead bodies. Classrooms are well-digitalised with PowerPoint projector, ambient speakers and surrounded by central air-conditioners. The library is large and equipped with all books and the latest health magazines, and it is well-equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities in our college are just awesome, and all we have to do is utilise them.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure, central library, a separate reading room facility for 24 hours and Wi-Fi facility. There are spacious classrooms and demo rooms. Our college also has a basketball court, cricket and football grounds, badminton court, volleyball court and a spacious gym with modern equipment. The quality of the food served here is good, but its taste is not that much good what we generally expect.

college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of YCMU Digital University com. At the UG level, the university offers BCom, BSc, BA, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MA, MBA, MCom, and various other courses to students. The university also provides certification and several other courses to students.
YCMOU is famous for its popular programmes, which are BSc and PhD. BSc and PhD students are placed in top companies such as TCS, Wipro, Bajaj Finserv, Tech Mahindra, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Yashwantrao Maharashtra Open University and their respective eligibility and YCMOU fees:

Give the entrance exam and successfully secure admission to various courses provided by the university. Yashwantrao Chavan Open University, Nashik, offers courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels. Below mentioned are some of the and their respective eligibility and YCMOU Nashik fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University fees for the MBA course will range between INR 8,000 and INR 1.7 lakh. The fee mentioned here is the total fee and is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, in indicative. For a detailed YCMOU MBA fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the University.
faqs.question: How much is the cost of YCMOU's MBA course?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no such provision for direct admission to the MBA programme at Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University  (YCMOU). Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme at YCMOU must fulfil the following requirements:The candidate must possess a bachelor’s degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate.Candidates must take YCMOU Common Entrance Test (CET) and should aim to score well in it as YCMOU inducts candidates through CET.Those who perform well in the CET will be shortlisted for the counselling process followed by document verification and fee payment.
faqs.question: Can we join MBA at YCMOU directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Students must fulfil one of the following criteria to be eligibleYCMOU pre admission course with minimum 40% marks and completed 21 years of ageClass 12 or equivalent examination of Maharashtra or other state HSC BoardGovernment-recognised Diploma of a minimum of two years after Class 10
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Com admission at YCMOU?

faqs.answer: A:    The minimum qualification required to apply for YCMOU BA distance education course is Class 12. Aspirants who pass a Diploma of a minimum of two-years after Class 10 can apply for admission. In case an aspirants fails Class 10, he or she won't be able to apply for the course. Such aspirants must first pass Class 10 and apply for a Diploma programme or complete their Class 12 for BA admission at YCMOU.

admission_overview.description: YCMOU Nashik admissions are primarily merit-based. The university offers more than fifty undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and certificate courses across multiple streams. These are offered in the distance education mode via the eight schools. Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University (YCMOU) admission is completely online. YCMOU admission to all these courses is subject to merit scores obtained by students in the last qualifying exam subject to meeting the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University. paragraphs: Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University (YCMOU) admissionis both merit and entrance exam-based. YCMOU, Nashik conducts entrance exams for some of the programmes such as MBA. Candidates seeking admission to any of the programmes offered at YCMOU must meet the eligibility criteria constituted by the university. Given below are the three main steps in which theYCMOU admission processcan be completed:
Step 1: YCMOU Application Process 2025

For admission at YCMOU, candidates must fill out the application form through YCMOU’s official website by paying the required application fee for final submission. Candidates must keep prescribed documents with them while filling out the application form for a hassle-free application process.
Step 2: Selection Criteria

For admission to the majority of the programmes at YCMOU, candidates are selected based on their aggregate/ marks in the qualifying examinations, i.e. merit-based but for other courses like MBA, the university conducts its entrance exam. Candidates based on their performance in the entrance examination will be selected for further admission process.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment

Candidates whose marks in the qualifying examination are under the specified range mentioned in the cutoff list or for courses like MBA for which YCMOU conducts entrance examination, candidates who perform well in the said examination will be selected for further admission process followed by document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at YCMOU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University offers an MBA course at the undergraduate level. The minimum duration to complete this course is two years and the maximum is of five years. The programme consists of 20 courses and project work spread over 4 semesters in two academic years. Candidates seeking admission to this course is required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University apart from a valid score in the entrance test, conducted by YCMOU.

faqs.question: Is YCMOU'S MBA degree recognised by UGC and AICTE?
faqs.answer: As per the information available of the official website of the University, Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University degree and post-graduate degree programmes are duly recognised and approved by the ‘ University Grant Commission (UGC)’. faqs.question: Is YCMOU degree valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: YCMOU's degree and post-graduate degree courses are duly recognised and approved by the ‘University Grant Commission (UGC)’. Hence, these courses are equivalent to the respective programmes offered by any other statutory university in India, for the purpose of employment. So, yes Yashwantrao Chavan Maharashtra Open University degree is valid for both private and government jobs.

sports.description: To promote the holistic development of the students, YCMOU offers a variety of sports facilities to the students. The institute organises various regional and state-level competitive events under the Student Welfare Centre. The students who perform well in these events further represent the university in the INDRADHANUSHYA and ASHVMEDH competitions. A special financial provision has been made by the university for the sports events. This provision includes food, uniform and other expenses during practice sessions. The sports meet is held every year, which is organised by the eight Regional Centres of the University at the regional levels and students of the study centres in the jurisdiction of the respective region participate in these regional-level sports tournaments. After the tournaments are over, the students who excel at these tournaments participate in the sports meet organised by the University. Moreover, students who excel at the University level are sent to the All India Association of Universities tournament and the state-level Inter-University tournament ‘Ashwamedh’ every year.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good, but the campus area of the college is very limited. The college doesn't provide any hostels and mess facilities to the students. The college campus is very small, that's why it doesn't include any hostels and mess.

There are labs for cooking, which means the kitchen is good. The hygiene is maintained, which helps students in many ways to grow and learn.

Medical facilities, sports, and games are there.
